contentBlocks.original:
ध्यानम्
शान्तं पद्मासनस्थं शशिधरमुकुटं पञ्चवक्त्रं त्रिनेत्रं
शूलं वज्रं च खड्गं परशुमभयदं दक्षभागे वहन्तम् ।
नागं पाशं च घण्टां प्रलयहुतवहं साङ्कुशं वामभागे
नानालङ्कारयुक्तं स्फटिकमणिनिभं पार्वतीशं नमामि ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dhyānam
śāntaṁ padmāsanasthaṁ śaśidharamukuṭaṁ pañcavaktraṁ trinētraṁ
śūlaṁ vajraṁ ca khaḍgaṁ paraśumabhayadaṁ dakṣabhāgē vahantam |
nāgaṁ pāśaṁ ca ghaṇṭāṁ pralayahutavahaṁ sāṅkuśaṁ vāmabhāgē
nānālaṅkārayuktaṁ sphaṭikamaṇinibhaṁ pārvatīśaṁ namāmi ||
contentBlocks.translation: Dhyāna (Meditation Verse): I bow to Pārvatīśa — the Lord of Pārvatī — who sits serenely upon the lotus throne, bearing the crescent moon as his crown, with five radiant faces and three eyes on each. In his right hands he holds the trident, the thunderbolt, the sword and the battleaxe, and bestows the gesture of fearlessness; in his left hands he carries the serpent, the noose, the bell, the fire of dissolution and the goad. Adorned with countless ornaments, his form shines like a flawless crystal gem.
contentBlocks.meanings: ध्यानम् (dhyānam) – meditation; शान्तं (śāntaṁ) – peaceful; पद्मासनस्थं (padmāsanasthaṁ) – seated in lotus posture (पद्मासन:lotus posture | स्थं:seated); शशिधरमुकुटं (śaśidharamukuṭaṁ) – moon-crested crown (शशिधर:moon-bearer | मुकुटं:crown); पञ्चवक्त्रं (pañcavaktraṁ) – five-faced; त्रिनेत्रं (trinetraṁ) – three-eyed; शूलं (śūlaṁ) – trident; वज्रं (vajraṁ) – thunderbolt; च (ca) – and; खड्गं (khaḍgaṁ) – sword; परशुमभयदं (paraśumabhayadaṁ) – axe and fear-removing (परशु:axe | अभयदं:fear-removing); दक्षभागे (dakṣabhāge) – on the right side; वहन्तम् (vahantam) – carrying; नागं (nāgaṁ) – snake; पाशं (pāśaṁ) – noose; च (ca) – and; घण्टां (ghaṇṭāṁ) – bell; प्रलयहुतवहं (pralayahutavahaṁ) – destructive fire (प्रलय:destruction | हुतवहं:fire); साङ्कुशं (sāṅkuśaṁ) – with a goad; वामभागे (vāmabhāge) – on the left side; नानालङ्कारयुक्तं (nānālaṅkārayuktaṁ) – adorned with various ornaments (नाना:various | अलङ्कार:ornaments | युक्तं:adorned); स्फटिकमणिनिभं (sphaṭikamaṇinibhaṁ) – crystal-like (स्फटिक:crystal | मणि:gem | निभं:like); पार्वतीशं (pārvatīśaṁ) – Lord of Pārvatī; नमामि (namāmi) – I bow;

contentBlocks.original:
स्तोत्रम्
ओं स्थिरः स्थाणुः प्रभुर्भीमः प्रवरो वरदो वरः ।
सर्वात्मा सर्वविख्यातः सर्वः सर्वकरो भवः ॥ १ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
stōtram
ōṁ sthiraḥ sthāṇuḥ prabhurbhīmaḥ pravarō varadō varaḥ |
sarvātmā sarvavikhyātaḥ sarvaḥ sarvakarō bhavaḥ || 1 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Om — Steadfast (Sthira), the Immovable Pillar (Sthāṇu), the Supreme Lord (Prabhu), the Formidable (Bhīma), the Most Excellent (Pravara), the Granter of Boons (Varada), the Choicest (Vara), the Soul of All (Sarvātmā), the All-renowned (Sarvavikhyāta), the All (Sarva), the All-doer (Sarvakara), the Cause of Existence (Bhava). (1)
contentBlocks.meanings: स्तोत्रम् (stotram) – hymn; स्थिरः (sthiraḥ) – stable; स्थाणुः (sthāṇuḥ) – immovable; प्रभुर्भीमः (prabhurbhīmaḥ) – mighty lord (प्रभुः:lord | भीमः:mighty); प्रवरो (pravaro) – excellent; वरदो (varado) – bestower of boons; वरः (varaḥ) – boon; सर्वात्मा (sarvātma) – soul of all; सर्वविख्यातः (sarvavikhyātaḥ) – universally renowned (सर्व:all | विख्यातः:renowned); सर्वः (sarvaḥ) – all; सर्वकरो (sarvakaro) – doer of all; भवः (bhavaḥ) – becoming;

contentBlocks.original:
जटी चर्मी शिखण्डी च सर्वाङ्गः सर्वभावनः ।
हरश्च हरिणाक्षश्च सर्वभूतहरः प्रभुः ॥ २ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jaṭī carmī śikhaṇḍī ca sarvāṅgaḥ sarvabhāvanaḥ |
haraśca hariṇākṣaśca sarvabhūtaharaḥ prabhuḥ || 2 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Matted-haired (Jaṭī), the Hide-robed (Carmī), the Crested (Śikhaṇḍī), the All-limbed (Sarvāṅga), the Source of All Being (Sarvabhāvana), the Remover of Sin (Hara), the Gazelle-eyed (Hariṇākṣa), the Destroyer of All Creatures (Sarvabhūtahara), the Lord (Prabhu). (2)
contentBlocks.meanings: जटी (jaṭī) – matted hair; चर्मी (carmī) – wearing a skin; शिखण्डी (śikhaṇḍī) – with a crest; च (ca) – and; सर्वाङ्गः (sarvāṅgaḥ) – whole-bodied; सर्वभावनः (sarvabhāvanaḥ) – creator of all; हरश्च (haraśca) – and Hara; हरिणाक्षश्च (hariṇākṣaśca) – and deer-eyed; सर्वभूतहरः (sarvabhūtaharaḥ) – remover of all beings (सर्व:all | भूत:beings | हरः:remover); प्रभुः (prabhuḥ) – lord;

contentBlocks.original:
प्रवृत्तिश्च निवृत्तिश्च नियतः शाश्वतो ध्रुवः ।
श्मशानवासी भगवान् खचरो गोचरोऽर्दनः ॥ ३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pravr̥ttiśca nivr̥ttiśca niyataḥ śāśvatō dhruvaḥ |
śmaśānavāsī bhagavān khacarō gōcarō:’rdanaḥ || 3 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Activity (Pravṛtti), Cessation (Nivṛtti), the Ordained (Niyata), the Eternal (Śāśvata), the Immovable (Dhruva), the Dweller in the Cremation Ground (Śmaśānavāsī), the Blessed One (Bhagavān), the Roamer of the Sky (Khacara), the Range of the Senses (Gocara), the Oppressor (Ardana). (3)
contentBlocks.meanings: प्रवृत्तिश्च (pravṛttiśca) – activity and; निवृत्तिश्च (nivṛttiśca) – cessation and; नियतः (niyataḥ) – regulated; शाश्वतः (śāśvataḥ) – eternal; ध्रुवः (dhruvaḥ) – constant; श्मशानवासी (śmaśānavāsī) – dweller in cremation grounds (श्मशान:cremation ground | वासी:dweller); भगवान् (bhagavān) – the Lord; खचरो (khacaraḥ) – sky-goer; गोचरोऽर्दनः (gocaro'rdanaḥ) – mover among cows, destroyer (गोचर:mover among cows | अर्दनः:destroyer);

contentBlocks.original:
अभिवाद्यो महाकर्मा तपस्वी भूतभावनः ।
उन्मत्तवेषप्रच्छन्नः सर्वलोकप्रजापतिः ॥ ४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
abhivādyō mahākarmā tapasvī bhūtabhāvanaḥ |
unmattavēṣapracchannaḥ sarvalōkaprajāpatiḥ || 4 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Worthy of Salutation (Abhivādya), the Great Doer (Mahākarmā), the Ascetic (Tapasvī), the Nurturer of Beings (Bhūtabhāvana), the One Disguised in Ecstatic Dress (Unmattaveṣapracchanna), the Progenitor-Lord of All Worlds (Sarvalōkaprajāpati). (4)
contentBlocks.meanings: अभिवाद्यो (abhivādyah) – worthy of reverence; महाकर्मा (mahākarmā) – great deeds (मह:great | कर्मा:deeds); तपस्वी (tapasvī) – ascetic; भूतभावनः (bhūtabhāvanaḥ) – creator of beings (भूत:beings | भावनः:creator); उन्मत्तवेषप्रच्छन्नः (unmattaveṣapracchannaḥ) – disguised as a madman (उन्मत्त:madman | वेष:disguise | प्रच्छन्नः:hidden); सर्वलोकप्रजापतिः (sarvalokaprajāpatiḥ) – lord of all worlds (सर्व:all | लोक:worlds | प्रजापतिः:lord);

contentBlocks.original:
महारूपो महाकायो वृषरूपो महायशाः ।
महात्मा सर्वभूतात्मा विश्वरूपो महाहनुः ॥ ५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahārūpō mahākāyō vr̥ṣarūpō mahāyaśāḥ |
mahātmā sarvabhūtātmā viśvarūpō mahāhanuḥ || 5 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Great Form (Mahārūpa), the Vast Body (Mahākāya), the Bull Form (Vṛṣarūpa), the Greatly Renowned (Mahāyaśa), the Great Soul (Mahātmā), the Soul of All Beings (Sarvabhūtātmā), the Universal Form (Viśvarūpa), the Mighty-jawed (Mahāhanu). (5)
contentBlocks.meanings: महारूपो (mahārūpo) – of great form (मह:great | रूप:form); महाकायो (mahākāyo) – of great body (मह:great | काय:body); वृषरूपो (vṛṣarūpo) – bull-shaped (वृष:bull | रूप:form); महायशाः (mahāyaśāḥ) – of great fame (मह:great | यश:fame); महात्मा (mahātmā) – great soul (मह:great | आत्मा:soul); सर्वभूतात्मा (sarvabhūtātmā) – soul of all beings (सर्व:all | भूत:beings | आत्मा:soul); विश्वरूपो (viśvarūpo) – universal form (विश्व:universe | रूप:form); महाहनुः (mahāhanuḥ) – great jaw (मह:great | हनु:jaw);

contentBlocks.original:
लोकपालोऽन्तर्हितात्मा प्रसादो हयगर्दभिः ।
पवित्रं च महांश्चैव नियमो नियमाश्रितः ॥ ६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lōkapālō:’ntarhitātmā prasādō hayagardabhiḥ |
pavitraṁ ca mahāṁścaiva niyamō niyamāśritaḥ || 6 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Guardian of the World (Lokapāla), the Hidden Self (Antarhitātmā), Grace (Prasāda), the Rider of Horse and Donkey (Hayagardabhi), the Pure (Pavitra), the Great (Mahān), the Ordainer (Niyama), the Refuge of the Disciplined (Niyamāśrita). (6)
contentBlocks.meanings: लोकपालोऽन्तर्हितात्मा (lokapālo'ntarhitātmā) – guardian with hidden soul (लोकपाल:guardian | अन्तर्हित:hidden | आत्मा:soul); प्रसादो (prasādo) – grace; हयगर्दभिः (hayagardabhiḥ) – by horse and donkey; पवित्रं (pavitraṁ) – pure; च (ca) – and; महांश्चैव (mahāṁścaiva) – great indeed (महान्:great | च:and | एव:indeed); नियमो (niyamo) – discipline; नियमाश्रितः (niyamāśritaḥ) – abiding by discipline (नियम:discipline | आश्रितः:abiding);

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वकर्मा स्वयम्भूत आदिरादिकरो निधिः ।
सहस्राक्षो विशालाक्षः सोमो नक्षत्रसाधकः ॥ ७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvakarmā svayambhūta ādirādikarō nidhiḥ |
sahasrākṣō viśālākṣaḥ sōmō nakṣatrasādhakaḥ || 7 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The All-acting (Sarvakarmā), the Self-born (Svayambhūta), the Primordial First Cause (Ādirādikara), the Treasure (Nidhi), the Thousand-eyed (Sahasrākṣa), the Wide-eyed (Viśālākṣa), the Moon (Soma), the Accomplisher of the Stars (Nakṣatrasādhaka). (7)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वकर्मा (sarvakarmā) – all-doer; स्वयम्भूत (svayambhūta) – self-manifested; आदिरादिकरो (ādirādikaro) – primordial creator (आदि:primordial | रादिकर:creator); निधिः (nidhiḥ) – treasure; सहस्राक्षो (sahasrākṣo) – thousand-eyed; विशालाक्षः (viśālākṣaḥ) – wide-eyed; सोमो (somo) – moon; नक्षत्रसाधकः (nakṣatrasādhakaḥ) – accomplisher of constellations (नक्षत्र:constellation | साधक:accomplisher);

contentBlocks.original:
चन्द्रः सूर्यः शनिः केतुर्ग्रहो ग्रहपतिर्वरः ।
अत्रिरत्र्या नमस्कर्ता मृगबाणार्पणोऽनघः ॥ ८ ॥ [आद्यन्तलयकर्ता च]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
candraḥ sūryaḥ śaniḥ kēturgrahō grahapatirvaraḥ |
atriratryā namaskartā mr̥gabāṇārpaṇō:’naghaḥ || 8 || [ādyantalayakartā ca]
contentBlocks.translation: The Moon (Candra), the Sun (Sūrya), Saturn (Śani), the Comet (Ketu), the Planet (Graha), the Lord of Planets (Grahapati), the Best (Vara), the Worshipper of Atri (Atrirātryānamaskartā), the Deer-arrow Holder (Mṛgabāṇārpaṇa), the Sinless (Anagha). (8)
contentBlocks.meanings: चन्द्रः (candraḥ) – moon; सूर्यः (sūryaḥ) – sun; शनिः (śaniḥ) – Saturn; केतुर्ग्रहो (keturgraho) – Ketu planet (केतुः:Ketu | ग्रहः:planet); ग्रहपतिर्वरः (grahapatirvaraḥ) – best among planet lords (ग्रहपतिः:planet lord | वरः:best); अत्रिरत्र्या (atriratryā) – Atri and his wife (अत्रिः:Atri | अत्र्या:of Atri's wife); नमस्कर्ता (namaskartā) – one who salutes; मृगबाणार्पणोऽनघः (mṛgabāṇārpaṇo'naghaḥ) – sinless one offering deer-arrow (मृग:deer | बाण:arrow | अर्पणः:offering | अनघः:sinless); आद्यन्तलयकर्ता (ādyantalayakartā) – creator of beginning and end (आद्य:beginning | अन्त:end | लय:dissolution | कर्ता:creator); च (ca) – and;

contentBlocks.original:
महातपा घोरतपा अदीनो दीनसाधकः ।
संवत्सरकरो मन्त्रः प्रमाणं परमं तपः ॥ ९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahātapā ghōratapā adīnō dīnasādhakaḥ |
saṁvatsarakarō mantraḥ pramāṇaṁ paramaṁ tapaḥ || 9 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Great Ascetic (Mahātapā), the Terrible Ascetic (Ghoratapā), the Undepressed (Adīna), the Fulfiller of the Humble (Dīnasādhaka), the Creator of the Year (Saṁvatsarakara), the Sacred Formula (Mantra), the Standard (Pramāṇa), the Supreme Austerity (Paramaṁ Tapaḥ). (9)
contentBlocks.meanings: महातपा (mahātapā) – great ascetic; घोरतपा (ghoratapā) – fierce ascetic; अदीनो (adīnaḥ) – not miserable; दीनसाधकः (dīnasādhakaḥ) – helper of the poor (दीन:poor | साधकः:helper); संवत्सरकरो (saṁvatsarakaro) – maker of the year (संवत्सर:year | करो:maker); मन्त्रः (mantraḥ) – mantra; प्रमाणं (pramāṇaṁ) – measure; परमं (paramaṁ) – supreme; तपः (tapaḥ) – austerity;

contentBlocks.original:
योगी योज्यो महाबीजो महारेता महाबलः ।
सुवर्णरेताः सर्वज्ञः सुबीजो बीजवाहनः ॥ १० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yōgī yōjyō mahābījō mahārētā mahābalaḥ |
suvarṇarētāḥ sarvajñaḥ subījō bījavāhanaḥ || 10 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Yogi (Yogī), the One to be Yoked (Yojya), the Great Seed (Mahābīja), the Great Semen (Mahāretā), the Greatly Powerful (Mahābala), the Golden-seeded (Suvarṇaretā), the Omniscient (Sarvajña), the Good Seed (Subīja), the Bearer of the Seed (Bījavāhana). (10)
contentBlocks.meanings: योगी (yogī) – yogi; योज्यो (yojyaḥ) – to be united; महाबीजो (mahābījaḥ) – great seed (मह:great | बीज:seed); महारेता (mahāretāḥ) – great energy (मह:great | रेत:energy); महाबलः (mahābalaḥ) – great strength (मह:great | बल:strength); सुवर्णरेताः (suvarṇaretāḥ) – golden energy (सुवर्ण:golden | रेत:energy); सर्वज्ञः (sarvajñaḥ) – omniscient (सर्व:all | ज्ञ:knowing); सुबीजो (subījaḥ) – good seed (सु:good | बीज:seed); बीजवाहनः (bījavāhanaḥ) – carrier of seed (बीज:seed | वाहन:carrier);

contentBlocks.original:
दशबाहुस्त्वनिमिषो नीलकण्ठ उमापतिः ।
विश्वरूपः स्वयं श्रेष्ठो बलवीरो बलो गणः ॥ ११ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
daśabāhustvanimiṣō nīlakaṇṭha umāpatiḥ |
viśvarūpaḥ svayaṁ śrēṣṭhō balavīrō balō gaṇaḥ || 11 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Ten-armed (Daśabāhu), the Unblinking (Animiṣa), the Blue-throated (Nīlakaṇṭha), the Lord of Umā (Umāpati), the Universal Form (Viśvarūpa), the Self-supreme (Svayaṁ Śreṣṭha), the Strong Hero (Balavīra), Power (Bala), the Host (Gaṇa). (11)
contentBlocks.meanings: दशबाहुस्त्वनिमिषो (daśabāhustvanimiṣo) – ten-armed and unblinking (दशबाहुः:ten-armed | त्वनिमिषः:unblinking); नीलकण्ठ (nīlakaṇṭha) – blue-throated; उमापतिः (umāpatih) – husband of Uma; विश्वरूपः (viśvarūpaḥ) – universal form; स्वयं (svayam) – self; श्रेष्ठो (śreṣṭho) – best; बलवीरो (balavīro) – strong hero; बलो (balo) – strength; गणः (gaṇaḥ) – group;

contentBlocks.original:
गणकर्ता गणपतिर्दिग्वासाः काम एव च ।
मन्त्रवित्परमो मन्त्रः सर्वभावकरो हरः ॥ १२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gaṇakartā gaṇapatirdigvāsāḥ kāma ēva ca |
mantravitparamō mantraḥ sarvabhāvakarō haraḥ || 12 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Maker of Hosts (Gaṇakartā), the Lord of Hosts (Gaṇapati), the Sky-clad (Digvāsā), Desire itself (Kāma), the Knower of Mantras (Mantravit), the Supreme Mantra (Paramaṁ Mantra), the All-sustainer (Sarvabhāvakara), the Remover (Hara). (12)
contentBlocks.meanings: गणकर्ता (gaṇakartā) – creator of groups (गण:group | कर्ता:creator); गणपतिर्दिग्वासाः (gaṇapatirdigvāsāḥ) – Ganapati, sky-clad (गणपति:Ganapati | दिग्वासाः:sky-clad); काम (kāma) – desire; एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; मन्त्रवित्परमो (mantravitparamo) – supreme knower of mantras (मन्त्रवित्:knower of mantras | परम:supreme); मन्त्रः (mantraḥ) – mantra; सर्वभावकरो (sarvabhāvakaro) – creator of all emotions (सर्व:all | भाव:emotions | कर:creator); हरः (haraḥ) – Shiva;

contentBlocks.original:
कमण्डलुधरो धन्वी बाणहस्तः कपालवान् ।
अशनी शतघ्नी खड्गी पट्‍टिशी चायुधी महान् ॥ १३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kamaṇḍaludharō dhanvī bāṇahastaḥ kapālavān |
aśanī śataghnī khaḍgī paṭ-ṭiśī cāyudhī mahān || 13 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Pot-holder (Kamaṇḍaludhara), the Bowman (Dhanvī), the Arrow-handed (Bāṇahasta), the Skull-bearer (Kapālavān), the Thunderbolt (Aśanī), the Club-wielder (Śataghṇī), the Sword-bearer (Khaḍgī), the Spear-wielder (Paṭṭiśī), the Armed One (Āyudhī), the Great (Mahān). (13)
contentBlocks.meanings: कमण्डलुधरो (kamaṇḍaludharo) – holder of a water pot (कमण्डलु:water pot | धरः:holder); धन्वी (dhanvī) – archer; बाणहस्तः (bāṇahastaḥ) – arrow in hand (बाण:arrow | हस्तः:hand); कपालवान् (kapālavān) – skull bearer (कपाल:skull | वान्:bearer); अशनी (aśanī) – thunderbolt; शतघ्नी (śataghni) – hundred-killer weapon; खड्गी (khaḍgī) – sword bearer; पट्‍टिशी (paṭṭiśī) – spear bearer; चायुधी (cāyudhī) – armed with weapons; महान् (mahān) – great;

contentBlocks.original:
स्रुवहस्तः सुरूपश्च तेजस्तेजस्करो निधिः ।
उष्णीषी च सुवक्त्रश्च उदग्रो विनतस्तथा ॥ १४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sruvahastaḥ surūpaśca tējastējaskarō nidhiḥ |
uṣṇīṣī ca suvaktraśca udagrō vinatastathā || 14 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Ladle-holder (Sruvahasta), the Handsome (Surūpa), Brilliance itself and the Source of Brilliance (Tejas Tejaskara), the Treasure (Nidhi), the Turbaned (Uṣṇīṣī), the Lovely-faced (Suvaktra), the Exalted (Udagra), the Humble (Vinata). (14)
contentBlocks.meanings: स्रुवहस्तः (sruvahastaḥ) – spoon-handed (स्रुव:spoon | हस्तः:hand); सुरूपश्च (surūpaśca) – and handsome (सुरूप:handsome | च:and); तेजस्तेजस्करो (tejastejaskaro) – radiance-enhancing (तेजस्:radiance | तेजस्कर:enhancing); निधिः (nidhiḥ) – treasure; उष्णीषी (uṣṇīṣī) – turbaned; च (ca) – and; सुवक्त्रश्च (suvaktraśca) – and beautiful-faced (सुवक्त्र:beautiful-faced | च:and); उदग्रो (udagro) – exalted; विनतस्तथा (vinatastathā) – and humble (विनत:humble | तथा:and);

contentBlocks.original:
दीर्घश्च हरिकेशश्च सुतीर्थः कृष्ण एव च ।
सृगालरूपः सिद्धार्थो मुण्डः सर्वशुभङ्करः ॥ १५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dīrghaśca harikēśaśca sutīrthaḥ kr̥ṣṇa ēva ca |
sr̥gālarūpaḥ siddhārthō muṇḍaḥ sarvaśubhaṅkaraḥ || 15 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Tall (Dīrgha), the Green-haired (Harikeśa), the Good Ford (Sutīrtha), Krishna himself (Kṛṣṇa), the Jackal-form (Śṛgālarūpa), the Accomplished One (Siddhārtha), the Shaven (Muṇḍa), the Bestower of All Auspiciousness (Sarvaśubhaṅkara). (15)
contentBlocks.meanings: दीर्घश्च (dīrghaśca) – and long; हरिकेशश्च (harikeśaśca) – and Harikesa; सुतीर्थः (sutīrthaḥ) – good pilgrimage; कृष्ण (kṛṣṇa) – Krishna; एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; सृगालरूपः (sṛgālarūpaḥ) – form of a jackal (सृगाल:jackal | रूपः:form); सिद्धार्थो (siddhārtho) – accomplished; मुण्डः (muṇḍaḥ) – shaven-headed; सर्वशुभङ्करः (sarvaśubhaṅkaraḥ) – all-auspicious (सर्व:all | शुभ:auspicious | ङ्करः:maker);

contentBlocks.original:
अजश्च बहुरूपश्च गन्धधारी कपर्द्यपि ।
ऊर्ध्वरेता ऊर्ध्वलिङ्ग ऊर्ध्वशायी नभःस्थलः ॥ १६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ajaśca bahurūpaśca gandhadhārī kapardyapi |
ūrdhvarētā ūrdhvaliṅga ūrdhvaśāyī nabhaḥsthalaḥ || 16 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Unborn (Aja), the Many-formed (Bahurūpa), the Fragrance-bearer (Gandhadhārī), the Braided-haired (Kapardī), the Upward-flowing Semen (Ūrdhvaretā), the Upraised Liṅga (Ūrdhvaliṅga), the One Who Lies Upward (Ūrdhvaśāyī), the Dweller in Space (Nabhaḥsthala). (16)
contentBlocks.meanings: अजश्च (ajaśca) – unborn and; बहुरूपश्च (bahurūpaśca) – many-formed and (बहुरूप:many-formed | च:and); गन्धधारी (gandhadhārī) – fragrance bearer (गन्ध:fragrance | धारी:bearer); कपर्द्यपि (kapardyapi) – with matted hair and (कपर्दि:with matted hair | अपि:and); ऊर्ध्वरेता (ūrdhvaretā) – with upward energy (ऊर्ध्व:upward | रेता:energy); ऊर्ध्वलिङ्ग (ūrdhvāliṅga) – upward symbol (ऊर्ध्व:upward | लिङ्ग:symbol); ऊर्ध्वशायी (ūrdhvaśāyī) – lying upwards (ऊर्ध्व:upward | शायी:lying); नभःस्थलः (nabhaḥsthalaḥ) – sky region (नभः:sky | स्थलः:region);

contentBlocks.original:
त्रिजटी चीरवासाश्च रुद्रः सेनापतिर्विभुः ।
अहश्चरो नक्तञ्चरस्तिग्ममन्युः सुवर्चसः ॥ १७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
trijaṭī cīravāsāśca rudraḥ sēnāpatirvibhuḥ |
ahaścarō naktañcarastigmamanyuḥ suvarcasaḥ || 17 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Triple-braided (Trijaṭī), the Bark-robed (Cīravāsā), the Fierce (Rudra), the Commander of the Army (Senāpati), the All-pervading (Vibhu), the Day-roamer (Ahaścara), the Night-roamer (Naktañcara), the Fiercely Angry (Tigmamanya), the Radiant (Suvarcasa). (17)
contentBlocks.meanings: त्रिजटी (trijaṭī) – three-braided; चीरवासाश्च (cīravāsāśca) – wearing bark garments (चीर:bark | वासा:garments | च:and); रुद्रः (rudraḥ) – Rudra; सेनापतिर्विभुः (senāpatirvibhuḥ) – mighty commander (सेनापति:commander | विभुः:mighty); अहश्चरो (ahaścaro) – day wanderer (अहः:day | चरः:wanderer); नक्तञ्चरस्तिग्ममन्युः (naktañcarastigmamanyuḥ) – night wanderer, fierce anger (नक्तं:night | चरः:wanderer | तिग्म:fierce | मन्युः:anger); सुवर्चसः (suvarcasaḥ) – radiant;

contentBlocks.original:
गजहा दैत्यहा कालो लोकधाता गुणाकरः ।
सिंहशार्दूलरूपश्च आर्द्रचर्माम्बरावृतः ॥ १८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gajahā daityahā kālō lōkadhātā guṇākaraḥ |
siṁhaśārdūlarūpaśca ārdracarmāmbarāvr̥taḥ || 18 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Slayer of Elephants (Gajahā), the Slayer of Demons (Daityahā), Time (Kāla), the Sustainer of the World (Lokadhātā), the Treasure of Virtues (Guṇākara), the One of Lion and Tiger Forms (Siṁhaśārdūlarūpa), the One Clad in Moist Hide (Ārdracarmāmbarāvṛta). (18)
contentBlocks.meanings: गजहा (gajahā) – elephant slayer; दैत्यहा (daityahā) – demon slayer; कालो (kālo) – time; लोकधाता (lokadhātā) – supporter of the world (लोक:world | धाता:supporter); गुणाकरः (guṇākaraḥ) – mine of virtues (गुण:virtue | आकरः:mine); सिंहशार्दूलरूपश्च (siṃhaśārdūlarūpaśca) – form of lion and tiger (सिंह:lion | शार्दूल:tiger | रूप:form | च:and); आर्द्रचर्माम्बरावृतः (ārdracarmāmbarāvṛtaḥ) – covered with wet skin (आर्द्र:wet | चर्म:skin | अम्बर:cloth | आवृतः:covered);

contentBlocks.original:
कालयोगी महानादः सर्वकामश्चतुष्पथः ।
निशाचरः प्रेतचारी भूतचारी महेश्वरः ॥ १९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kālayōgī mahānādaḥ sarvakāmaścatuṣpathaḥ |
niśācaraḥ prētacārī bhūtacārī mahēśvaraḥ || 19 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Time-yogi (Kālayogī), the Great Sound (Mahānāda), All Desires (Sarvakāma), the Crossroads (Catuṣpatha), the Night-wanderer (Niśācara), the Haunter of the Cremation Ground (Pretacārī), the Wanderer among Ghosts (Bhūtacārī), the Great Lord (Maheśvara). (19)
contentBlocks.meanings: कालयोगी (kālayogī) – time ascetic (काल:time | योगी:ascetic); महानादः (mahānādaḥ) – great sound (मह:great | नादः:sound); सर्वकामश्चतुष्पथः (sarvakāmaścatuṣpathaḥ) – all desires crossroad (सर्व:all | काम:desires | चतुष्पथः:crossroad); निशाचरः (niśācaraḥ) – night wanderer (निशा:night | चरः:wanderer); प्रेतचारी (pretacārī) – ghost wanderer (प्रेत:ghost | चारी:wanderer); भूतचारी (bhūtacārī) – spirit wanderer (भूत:spirit | चारी:wanderer); महेश्वरः (maheśvaraḥ) – great lord (मह:great | ईश्वरः:lord);

contentBlocks.original:
बहुभूतो बहुधरः स्वर्भानुरमितो गतिः ।
नृत्यप्रियो नित्यनर्तो नर्तकः सर्वलालसः ॥ २० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bahubhūtō bahudharaḥ svarbhānuramitō gatiḥ |
nr̥tyapriyō nityanartō nartakaḥ sarvalālasaḥ || 20 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Many-being (Bahubhūta), the Many-sustained (Bahudhara), the Eclipser (Svarbhānu), the Limitless (Amita), the Goal (Gati), the Dance-lover (Nṛtyapriya), the Eternal Dancer (Nityanarṭa), the Dancer (Nartaka), the Enchanter of All (Sarvalālasa). (20)
contentBlocks.meanings: बहुभूतो (bahubhūtaḥ) – many forms; बहुधरः (bahudharaḥ) – many supports; स्वर्भानुरमितो (svarbhānuramitaḥ) – immeasurable light (स्वर्भानु:light | अमितः:immeasurable); गतिः (gatiḥ) – movement; नृत्यप्रियो (nṛtyapriyaḥ) – fond of dance (नृत्य:dance | प्रियः:fond of); नित्यनर्तो (nityanartaḥ) – eternal dancer (नित्य:eternal | नर्तः:dancer); नर्तकः (nartakaḥ) – dancer; सर्वलालसः (sarvalālasaḥ) – desirous of all (सर्व:all | लालसः:desirous);

contentBlocks.original:
घोरो महातपाः पाशो नित्यो गिरिरुहो नभः ।
सहस्रहस्तो विजयो व्यवसायो ह्यतन्द्रितः ॥ २१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ghōrō mahātapāḥ pāśō nityō giriruhō nabhaḥ |
sahasrahastō vijayō vyavasāyō hyatandritaḥ || 21 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Terrible (Ghora), the Great Ascetic (Mahātapā), the Noose (Pāśa), the Eternal (Nitya), the Mountain-climber (Girirūha), Space (Nabha), the Thousand-handed (Sahasrahasta), the Victorious (Vijaya), Perseverance (Vyavasāya), the Tireless (Atandrita). (21)
contentBlocks.meanings: घोरो (ghoraḥ) – terrible; महातपाः (mahātapāḥ) – great austerity; पाशो (pāśaḥ) – noose; नित्यो (nityaḥ) – eternal; गिरिरुहो (giriruhaḥ) – mountain dweller; नभः (nabhaḥ) – sky; सहस्रहस्तो (sahasrahastaḥ) – thousand-handed (सहस्र:thousand | हस्तः:handed); विजयो (vijayaḥ) – victory; व्यवसायो (vyavasāyaḥ) – determination; ह्यतन्द्रितः (hyatandritaḥ) – unwearied;

contentBlocks.original:
अधर्षणो धर्षणात्मा यज्ञहा कामनाशकः । [मर्ष]
दक्षयागापहारी च सुसहो मध्यमस्तथा ॥ २२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
adharṣaṇō dharṣaṇātmā yajñahā kāmanāśakaḥ | [marṣa]
dakṣayāgāpahārī ca susahō madhyamastathā || 22 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Unconquerable (Adharṣaṇa), the Conqueror by Nature (Dharṣaṇātmā), the Destroyer of Sacrifice (Yajñahā), the Annihilator of Desire (Kāmanāśaka), the Plunderer of Dakṣa's Sacrifice (Dakṣayāgāpahārī), the Patient (Susaha), the Intermediate (Madhyama). (22)
contentBlocks.meanings: अधर्षणो (adharṣaṇo) – invincible; धर्षणात्मा (dharṣaṇātmā) – aggressive nature (धर्षण:aggression | आत्मा:nature); यज्ञहा (yajñahā) – destroyer of sacrifices (यज्ञ:sacrifice | हा:destroyer); कामनाशकः (kāmanāśakaḥ) – destroyer of desires (काम:desires | नाशकः:destroyer); [मर्ष] ([marṣa]) – null; दक्षयागापहारी (dakṣayāgāpahārī) – stealer of Daksha's sacrifice (दक्ष:Daksha | याग:sacrifice | अपहारी:stealer); च (ca) – and; सुसहो (susaho) – very tolerant; मध्यमस्तथा (madhyamastathā) – also moderate (मध्यम:moderate | तथा:also);

contentBlocks.original:
तेजोपहारी बलहा मुदितोऽर्थोऽजितोऽवरः ।
गम्भीरघोषो गम्भीरो गम्भीरबलवाहनः ॥ २३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
tējōpahārī balahā muditō:’rthō:’jitō:’varaḥ |
gambhīraghōṣō gambhīrō gambhīrabalavāhanaḥ || 23 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Taker of Brilliance (Tejopahārī), the Destroyer of Strength (Balahā), the Joyful (Mudita), the Wealthy (Artha), the Unconquered (Ajita), the Inferior (Avara), the Deep-voiced (Gambhīraghoṣa), the Profound (Gambhīra), the One of Deep Strength and Conveyance (Gambhīrabalavāhana). (23)
contentBlocks.meanings: तेजोपहारी (tejopahārī) – remover of brilliance (तेजः:brilliance | उपहारी:remover); बलहा (balahā) – destroyer of strength (बल:strength | हा:destroyer); मुदितोऽर्थोऽजितोऽवरः (muditārtho'jito'varaḥ) – joyful, meaningful, unconquered, inferior; गम्भीरघोषो (gambhīraghoṣaḥ) – deep-voiced (गम्भीर:deep | घोष:voice); गम्भीरो (gambhīraḥ) – profound; गम्भीरबलवाहनः (gambhīrabalavāhanaḥ) – carrier of profound strength (गम्भीर:profound | बल:strength | वाहन:carrier);

contentBlocks.original:
न्यग्रोधरूपो न्यग्रोधो वृक्षकर्णस्थितिर्विभुः ।
सुतीक्ष्णदशनश्चैव महाकायो महाननः ॥ २४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nyagrōdharūpō nyagrōdhō vr̥kṣakarṇasthitirvibhuḥ |
sutīkṣṇadaśanaścaiva mahākāyō mahānanaḥ || 24 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Banyan-form (Nyagrodhārūpa), the Banyan (Nyagrodha), the Dweller at the Tree's Ear (Vṛkṣakarṇasthiti), the All-pervading (Vibhu), the Very Sharp-toothed (Sutīkṣṇadaśana), the Vast-bodied (Mahākāya), the Vast-faced (Mahānana). (24)
contentBlocks.meanings: न्यग्रोधरूपो (nyagrodharūpo) – form of a banyan tree (न्यग्रोध:banyan tree | रूपः:form); न्यग्रोधो (nyagrodho) – banyan tree; वृक्षकर्णस्थितिर्विभुः (vṛkṣakarṇasthitirvibhuḥ) – residing in tree ears (वृक्ष:tree | कर्ण:ear | स्थिति:residing | विभुः:all-pervading); सुतीक्ष्णदशनश्चैव (sutīkṣṇadaśanaścaiva) – with sharp teeth (सुतीक्ष्ण:sharp | दशनः:teeth | च:and | एव:indeed); महाकायो (mahākāyo) – great-bodied (महा:great | कायः:body); महाननः (mahānanaḥ) – having a great face (महा:great | अननः:face);

contentBlocks.original:
विष्वक्सेनो हरिर्यज्ञः सम्युगापीडवाहनः ।
तीक्ष्णतापश्च हर्यश्वः सहायः कर्मकालवित् ॥ २५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viṣvaksēnō hariryajñaḥ samyugāpīḍavāhanaḥ |
tīkṣṇatāpaśca haryaśvaḥ sahāyaḥ karmakālavit || 25 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Viṣvaksena (Commander of all directions), Hari (the tawny one), the Sacrifice (Yajña), the Crusher in Battle (Samyugāpīḍavāhana), the Keen Torment (Tīkṣṇatāpa), the Tawny-horsed (Haryaśva), the Helper (Sahāya), the Knower of Action and Time (Karmakālavit). (25)
contentBlocks.meanings: विष्वक्सेनो (viṣvakseno) – Vishvaksena; हरिर्यज्ञः (hariryajñaḥ) – Hari as sacrifice (हरि:Hari | यज्ञः:sacrifice); सम्युगापीडवाहनः (samyugāpīḍavāhanaḥ) – charioteer in battle (सम्युग:battle | पीड:pressure | वाहनः:charioteer); तीक्ष्णतापश्च (tīkṣṇatāpaśca) – sharp heat (तीक्ष्ण:sharp | ताप:heat | च:and); हर्यश्वः (haryaśvaḥ) – with swift horses (हरि:swift | अश्वः:horse); सहायः (sahāyaḥ) – companion; कर्मकालवित् (karmakālavit) – knower of action timing (कर्म:action | काल:time | वित्:knower);

contentBlocks.original:
विष्णुप्रसादितो यज्ञः समुद्रो बडबामुखः ।
हुताशनसहायश्च प्रशान्तात्मा हुताशनः ॥ २६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viṣṇuprasāditō yajñaḥ samudrō baḍabāmukhaḥ |
hutāśanasahāyaśca praśāntātmā hutāśanaḥ || 26 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The One Who Gratified Viṣṇu (Viṣṇuprasādita), the Sacrifice (Yajña), the Ocean (Samudra), the Mare's-mouth Fire (Baḍabāmukha), the Companion of the Sacrificial Fire (Hutāśanasahāya), the Serene Self (Praśāntātmā), the Sacrificial Fire (Hutāśana). (26)
contentBlocks.meanings: विष्णुप्रसादितो (viṣṇuprasādito) – favored by Vishnu (विष्णु:Vishnu | प्रसादित:favored); यज्ञः (yajñaḥ) – sacrifice; समुद्रो (samudro) – ocean; बडबामुखः (baḍabāmukhaḥ) – submarine fire (बडबा:submarine | मुख:mouth); हुताशनसहायश्च (hutāśanasahāyaśca) – and helper of fire (हुताशन:fire | सहाय:helper | च:and); प्रशान्तात्मा (praśāntātmā) – calm-minded (प्रशान्त:calm | आत्मा:mind); हुताशनः (hutāśanaḥ) – fire;

contentBlocks.original:
उग्रतेजा महातेजा जन्यो विजयकालवित् ।
ज्योतिषामयनं सिद्धिः सर्वविग्रह एव च ॥ २७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ugratējā mahātējā janyō vijayakālavit |
jyōtiṣāmayanaṁ siddhiḥ sarvavigraha ēva ca || 27 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Fierce-brilliant (Ugratejā), the Greatly Brilliant (Mahātejā), the Born of the People (Janya), the Knower of Time's Victory (Vijayakālavit), the Course of Lights (Jyotiṣāmayana), Perfection (Siddhi), Every Form of Conflict (Sarvavigraha). (27)
contentBlocks.meanings: उग्रतेजा (ugratejā) – fierce brilliance (उग्र:fierce | तेजा:brilliance); महातेजा (mahātejā) – great brilliance (मह:great | तेजा:brilliance); जन्यो (janyo) – born of; विजयकालवित् (vijayakālavit) – knower of victory time (विजय:victory | काल:time | वित्:knower); ज्योतिषामयनं (jyotiṣāmayanaṁ) – abode of luminaries (ज्योतिषाम्:of luminaries | अयनं:abode); सिद्धिः (siddhiḥ) – perfection; सर्वविग्रह (sarvavigraha) – all forms (सर्व:all | विग्रह:forms); एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and;

contentBlocks.original:
शिखी मुण्डी जटी ज्वाली मूर्तिजो मूर्धगो बली ।
वेणवी पणवी ताली खली कालकटङ्कटः ॥ २८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śikhī muṇḍī jaṭī jvālī mūrtijō mūrdhagō balī |
vēṇavī paṇavī tālī khalī kālakaṭaṅkaṭaḥ || 28 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Crested (Śikhī), the Shaven (Muṇḍī), the Matted-haired (Jaṭī), the Flame-like (Jvālī), the Born of Form (Mūrtija), the Crown-dweller (Mūrdhaga), the Powerful (Balī), the Flute-player (Veṇavī), the Drum-player (Paṇavī), the Cymbal-player (Tālī), the Thresher (Khalī), the Terrible Time (Kālakaṭaṅkaṭa). (28)
contentBlocks.meanings: शिखी (śikhī) – having a crest; मुण्डी (muṇḍī) – shaven-headed; जटी (jaṭī) – matted hair; ज्वाली (jvālī) – flame-like; मूर्तिजो (mūrtijo) – born of form; मूर्धगो (mūrdhago) – rising to the head; बली (balī) – strong; वेणवी (veṇavī) – flute player; पणवी (paṇavī) – drum player; ताली (tālī) – cymbal player; खली (khalī) – empty; कालकटङ्कटः (kālakaṭaṅkaṭaḥ) – terrifying time (काल:time | कटङ्कट:terrifying);

contentBlocks.original:
नक्षत्रविग्रहमतिर्गुणबुद्धिर्लयोऽगमः ।
प्रजापतिर्विश्वबाहुर्विभागः सर्वगोऽमुखः ॥ २९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nakṣatravigrahamatirguṇabuddhirlayō:’gamaḥ |
prajāpatirviśvabāhurvibhāgaḥ sarvagō:’mukhaḥ || 29 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Star-minded (Nakṣatravigrahamati), the Virtuous Intelligence (Guṇabuddhi), Dissolution (Laya), the Inaccessible (Agama), the Lord of Creatures (Prajāpati), the World-armed (Viśvabāhu), the Divider (Vibhāga), the All-pervading (Sarvaga), the Faceless (Amukha). (29)
contentBlocks.meanings: नक्षत्रविग्रहमतिर्गुणबुद्धिर्लयोऽगमः (nakṣatravigrahamatirguṇabuddhirlayo'gamah) – cosmic form, intellect, qualities (नक्षत्रविग्रह:cosmic form | मतिः:intellect | गुणबुद्धिः:qualities | लयः:dissolution | अगमः:unreachable); प्रजापतिर्विश्वबाहुर्विभागः (prajāpatirviśvabāhurvibhāgaḥ) – lord of beings, universal arms (प्रजापतिः:lord of beings | विश्वबाहुः:universal arms | विभागः:division); सर्वगोऽमुखः (sarvago'mukhaḥ) – all-pervading, faceless (सर्वगः:all-pervading | अमुखः:faceless);

contentBlocks.original:
विमोचनः सुसरणो हिरण्यकवचोद्भवः ।
मेढ्रजो बलचारी च महीचारी स्रुतस्तथा ॥ ३० ॥ [मेघजो]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vimōcanaḥ susaraṇō hiraṇyakavacōdbhavaḥ |
mēḍhrajō balacārī ca mahīcārī srutastathā || 30 || [mēghajō]
contentBlocks.translation: The Liberator (Vimocana), the Easy-going (Susaraṇa), the Born of the Golden Armour (Hiraṇyakavacōdbhava), the Born of the Phallus (Medhrajā), the Power-moving (Balacārī), the Earth-roamer (Mahīcārī), the Heard One (Sruta). (30)
contentBlocks.meanings: विमोचनः (vimochanaḥ) – liberator; सुसरणो (susaraṇo) – good path; हिरण्यकवचोद्भवः (hiraṇyakavacodbhavaḥ) – born of golden armor (हिरण्य:golden | कवच:armor | उद्भवः:born); मेढ्रजो (meḍhrajo) – born from the loins; बलचारी (balacārī) – moving with strength; च (ca) – and; महीचारी (mahīcārī) – moving on earth; स्रुतस्तथा (srutastathā) – and also heard; [मेघजो] ([meghajo]) – born from clouds;

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वतूर्यनिनादी च सर्वातोद्यपरिग्रहः ।
व्यालरूपो गुहावासी गुहो माली तरङ्गवित् ॥ ३१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvatūryaninādī ca sarvātōdyaparigrahaḥ |
vyālarūpō guhāvāsī guhō mālī taraṅgavit || 31 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Sounding of All Instruments (Sarvatūryaninādī), the Master of All Instruments (Sarvātodyaparigraha), the Serpent-form (Vyālarūpa), the Cave-dweller (Guhāvāsī), the Secret One (Guha), the Garlanded (Mālī), the Knower of Waves (Taraṅgavit). (31)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वतूर्यनिनादी (sarvatūryaninādī) – all musical instruments' sound (सर्व:all | तूर्य:musical instrument | निनादी:sound); च (ca) – and; सर्वातोद्यपरिग्रहः (sarvātodyaparigrahaḥ) – possessor of all musical instruments (सर्व:all | आतोद्य:musical instruments | परिग्रहः:possessor); व्यालरूपो (vyālarūpo) – in the form of a serpent; गुहावासी (guhāvāsī) – dweller in caves (गुहा:cave | वासी:dweller); गुहो (guho) – Guha (a name); माली (mālī) – garlanded; तरङ्गवित् (taraṅgavit) – knower of waves;

contentBlocks.original:
त्रिदशस्त्रिकालधृक्कर्मसर्वबन्धविमोचनः ।
बन्धनस्त्वसुरेन्द्राणां युधिशत्रुविनाशनः ॥ ३२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
tridaśastrikāladhr̥kkarmasarvabandhavimōcanaḥ |
bandhanastvasurēndrāṇāṁ yudhiśatruvināśanaḥ || 32 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Thirty (Tridaśa), the Bearer of Three Times (Trikāladhṛt), the Liberator from All Karmic Bondage (Karmasarvabandhavimocana), the Binder (Bandhana) of the Chiefs of Asuras, the Destroyer of Enemies in Battle (Yudhiśatruvinā́śana). (32)
contentBlocks.meanings: त्रिदशस्त्रिकालधृक्कर्मसर्वबन्धविमोचनः (tridaśastrikāladhṛkkarmasarvabandhavimocanaḥ) – liberator from all bonds (त्रिदश:gods | त्रिकालधृक्:controller of three times | कर्म:action | सर्वबन्ध:all bonds | विमोचनः:liberator); बन्धनस्त्वसुरेन्द्राणां (bandhanastvasurendrāṇāṁ) – bondage for demon lords (बन्धनः:bondage | त्:for | सुरेन्द्राणां:of the lords); युधिशत्रुविनाशनः (yudhiśatruvināśanaḥ) – destroyer of battle enemies (युधि:in battle | शत्रु:enemy | विनाशनः:destroyer);

contentBlocks.original:
साङ्ख्यप्रसादो दुर्वासाः सर्वसाधुनिषेवितः ।
प्रस्कन्दनो विभागज्ञो अतुल्यो यज्ञभागवित् ॥ ३३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sāṅkhyaprasādō durvāsāḥ sarvasādhuniṣēvitaḥ |
praskandanō vibhāgajñō atulyō yajñabhāgavit || 33 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Sāṁkhya-grace (Sāṅkhyaprasāda), Durvāsas (the foul-smelling sage), the Served by All Saints (Sarvasādhuniṣevita), the Overflower (Praskandana), the Knower of Division (Vibhāgajña), the Incomparable (Atulya), the Knower of the Yajña share (Yajñabhāgavit). (33)
contentBlocks.meanings: साङ्ख्यप्रसादो (sāṅkhyaprasādo) – grace of Sāṅkhya (साङ्ख्य:Sāṅkhya philosophy | प्रसादः:grace); दुर्वासाः (durvāsāḥ) – Durvasa (sage); सर्वसाधुनिषेवितः (sarvasādhuniṣevitaḥ) – served by all good (सर्व:all | साधु:good | निषेवितः:served); प्रस्कन्दनो (praskandano) – overcoming obstacles; विभागज्ञो (vibhāgajño) – knower of divisions (विभाग:division | ज्ञः:knower); अतुल्यो (atulyaḥ) – incomparable; यज्ञभागवित् (yajñabhāgavit) – knower of sacrificial shares (यज्ञ:sacrifice | भाग:share | वित्:knower);

contentBlocks.original:
सर्ववासः सर्वचारी दुर्वासा वासवोऽमरः ।
हैमो हेमकरोऽयज्ञः सर्वधारी धरोत्तमः ॥ ३४ ॥ [यज्ञः]
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvavāsaḥ sarvacārī durvāsā vāsavō:’maraḥ |
haimō hēmakarō:’yajñaḥ sarvadhārī dharōttamaḥ || 34 || [yajñaḥ]
contentBlocks.translation: The All-dwelling (Sarvavāsa), the All-wandering (Sarvacārī), Durvāsas (ascetic of great austerity), Vāsava (like Indra), the Immortal (Amara), the Golden (Haima), the Gold-maker (Hemakara), the Yajña (sacrifice), the All-bearer (Sarvadhārī), the Supreme Bearer (Dharōttama). (34)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्ववासः (sarvavāsaḥ) – dweller in all; सर्वचारी (sarvacārī) – moving everywhere; दुर्वासा (durvāsā) – Durvasa (sage); वासवोऽमरः (vāsavo'maraḥ) – Indra, the immortal (वासवः:Indra | अमरः:immortal); हैमो (haimo) – golden; हेमकरोऽयज्ञः (hemakaro'yajñaḥ) – gold-maker, non-sacrificer (हेमकरः:gold-maker | अयज्ञः:non-sacrificer); सर्वधारी (sarvadhārī) – supporter of all; धरोत्तमः (dharottamaḥ) – best of the bearers; यज्ञः (yajñaḥ) – sacrifice;

contentBlocks.original:
लोहिताक्षो महाक्षश्च विजयाक्षो विशारदः ।
सङ्ग्रहो निग्रहः कर्ता सर्पचीरनिवासनः ॥ ३५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lōhitākṣō mahākṣaśca vijayākṣō viśāradaḥ |
saṅgrahō nigrahaḥ kartā sarpacīranivāsanaḥ || 35 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Red-eyed (Lohitākṣa), the Great-eyed (Mahākṣa), the Victory-eyed (Vijayākṣa), the Skilled (Viśārada), the Gatherer (Saṅgraha), the Restrainer (Nigraha), the Doer (Kartā), the Serpent-bark-robed (Sarpacīranivāsana). (35)
contentBlocks.meanings: लोहिताक्षो (lohitākṣaḥ) – red-eyed; महाक्षश्च (mahākṣaśca) – great-eyed and; विजयाक्षो (vijayākṣaḥ) – victorious-eyed; विशारदः (viśāradaḥ) – skilled; सङ्ग्रहो (saṅgrahaḥ) – collector; निग्रहः (nigrahaḥ) – restrainer; कर्ता (kartā) – doer; सर्पचीरनिवासनः (sarpacīranivāsanaḥ) – wearer of snake skin (सर्प:snake | चीर:skin | निवासनः:wearer);

contentBlocks.original:
मुख्योऽमुख्यश्च देहश्च काहलिः सर्वकामदः ।
सर्वकालप्रसादश्च सुबलो बलरूपधृत् ॥ ३६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mukhyō:’mukhyaśca dēhaśca kāhaliḥ sarvakāmadaḥ |
sarvakālaprasādaśca subalō balarūpadhr̥t || 36 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Chief (Mukhya), the Not-chief (Amukhya), the Body (Deha), the War-drum (Kāhali), the Granter of All Wishes (Sarvakāmada), the Always Gracious (Sarvakālaprasāda), the Strong (Subala), the Bearer of Strength-form (Balarūpadhṛt). (36)
contentBlocks.meanings: मुख्योऽमुख्यश्च (mukhyo'mukhyaśca) – chief and non-chief (मुख्यः:chief | अमुख्यः:non-chief | च:and); देहश्च (dehaśca) – body and (देहः:body | च:and); काहलिः (kāhaliḥ) – Kahali; सर्वकामदः (sarvakāmadaḥ) – grantor of all desires (सर्व:all | कामदः:grantor of desires); सर्वकालप्रसादश्च (sarvakālaprasādaśca) – graceful at all times (सर्वकाल:all times | प्रसादः:grace | च:and); सुबलो (subalo) – very strong; बलरूपधृत् (balarūpadhṛt) – assumer of the form of strength (बल:strength | रूप:form | धृत्:assumer);

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वकामवरश्चैव सर्वदः सर्वतोमुखः ।
आकाशनिर्विरूपश्च निपाती ह्यवशः खगः ॥ ३७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvakāmavaraścaiva sarvadaḥ sarvatōmukhaḥ |
ākāśanirvirūpaśca nipātī hyavaśaḥ khagaḥ || 37 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Granter of All Desired Boons (Sarvakāmavara), the Giver of All (Sarvada), the All-faced (Sarvatomukha), the Formless as Space (Ākāśanirvirūpa), the Fallen (Nipātī), the Uncontrolled (Avaśa), the Bird (Khaga). (37)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वकामवरश्चैव (sarvakāmavaraścaiva) – bestower of all desires (सर्वकाम:all desires | वर:bestower | च:and | एव:indeed); सर्वदः (sarvadaḥ) – giver of all; सर्वतोमुखः (sarvatomukhaḥ) – facing everywhere (सर्वतः:everywhere | मुखः:facing); आकाशनिर्विरूपश्च (ākāśanirvirūpaśca) – formless as the sky (आकाश:sky | निर्विरूप:formless | च:and); निपाती (nipātī) – descender; ह्यवशः (hyavaśaḥ) – uncontrolled; खगः (khagaḥ) – bird;

contentBlocks.original:
रौद्ररूपोऽम्शुरादित्यो बहुरश्मिः सुवर्चसी ।
वसुवेगो महावेगो मनोवेगो निशाचरः ॥ ३८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
raudrarūpō:’mśurādityō bahuraśmiḥ suvarcasī |
vasuvēgō mahāvēgō manōvēgō niśācaraḥ || 38 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Fierce-form (Raudrarūpa), the Ray (Aṁśu), the Sun (Āditya), the Many-rayed (Bahuraśmi), the Brilliant (Suvarcasī), the Vasu-swift (Vasuvega), the Very Swift (Mahāvega), the Mind-swift (Manovega), the Night-wanderer (Niśācara). (38)
contentBlocks.meanings: रौद्ररूपोऽम्शुरादित्यो (raudrarūpo'mśurādityaḥ) – fierce form, sun (रौद्ररूप:fierce form | अम्शुरादित्य:sun); बहुरश्मिः (bahuraśmiḥ) – many-rayed; सुवर्चसी (suvarcasī) – brilliant; वसुवेगो (vasuvegaḥ) – swift as wind (वसु:wind | वेग:speed); महावेगो (mahāvegaḥ) – great speed (मह:great | वेग:speed); मनोवेगो (manovegaḥ) – mind speed (मन:mind | वेग:speed); निशाचरः (niśācaraḥ) – night wanderer;

contentBlocks.original:
सर्ववासी श्रियावासी उपदेशकरोऽकरः ।
मुनिरात्मनिरालोकः सम्भग्नश्च सहस्रदः ॥ ३९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvavāsī śriyāvāsī upadēśakarō:’karaḥ |
munirātmanirālōkaḥ sambhagnaśca sahasradaḥ || 39 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The All-dwelling (Sarvavāsī), the Lakṣmī-dwelling (Śriyāvāsī), the Teacher (Upadeśakara), the Akara (the letter A), the Sage (Muni), the Self-luminous (Ātmanirāloka), the Broken One (Sambhagna), the Thousand-giver (Sahasrada). (39)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्ववासी (sarvavāsī) – dweller in all; श्रियावासी (śriyāvāsī) – dweller in prosperity; उपदेशकरोऽकरः (upadeśakaro'karaḥ) – giver of teachings; मुनिरात्मनिरालोकः (munirātmanirālokaḥ) – sage self-illumined; सम्भग्नश्च (sambhagnaśca) – and shattered; सहस्रदः (sahasradaḥ) – giver of thousands;

contentBlocks.original:
पक्षी च पक्षरूपश्च अतिदीप्तो विशां पतिः ।
उन्मादो मदनः कामो ह्यश्वत्थोऽर्थकरो यशः ॥ ४० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pakṣī ca pakṣarūpaśca atidīptō viśāṁ patiḥ |
unmādō madanaḥ kāmō hyaśvatthō:’rthakarō yaśaḥ || 40 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Bird (Pakṣī), the Winged-form (Pakṣarūpa), the Exceedingly Brilliant (Atidīpta), the Lord of the People (Viśāṁ Pati), the Maddened (Unmāda), the Enchanter (Madana), Desire (Kāma), the Sacred Fig Tree (Aśvattha), the Giver of Wealth (Arthakara), Fame (Yaśa). (40)
contentBlocks.meanings: पक्षी (pakṣī) – bird; च (ca) – and; पक्षरूपश्च (pakṣarūpaśca) – and winged form (पक्ष:wing | रूप:form | च:and); अतिदीप्तो (atidīpto) – very bright; विशां (viśāṃ) – of the people; पतिः (patiḥ) – lord; उन्मादो (unmādo) – madness; मदनः (madanaḥ) – Cupid; कामो (kāmo) – desire; ह्यश्वत्थोऽर्थकरो (hyaśvattho'rthakaro) – beneficial like the fig tree (ह्य:indeed | अश्वत्थ:fig tree | अर्थकर:beneficial); यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame;

contentBlocks.original:
वामदेवश्च वामश्च प्राग्दक्षिणश्च वामनः ।
सिद्धयोगी महर्षिश्च सिद्धार्थः सिद्धसाधकः ॥ ४१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vāmadēvaśca vāmaśca prāgdakṣiṇaśca vāmanaḥ |
siddhayōgī maharṣiśca siddhārthaḥ siddhasādhakaḥ || 41 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Vāmadeva (the beautiful god), the Left (Vāma), the Fore-right (Prāgdakṣiṇa), the Dwarf (Vāmana), the Accomplished Yogi (Siddhayogī), the Great Seer (Maharṣi), the Fulfilled (Siddhārtha), the Fulfiller of the Accomplished (Siddhasādhaka). (41)
contentBlocks.meanings: वामदेवश्च (vāmadevaśca) – and Vāmadeva (वामदेव:Vāmadeva | च:and); वामश्च (vāmaśca) – and beautiful (वाम:beautiful | च:and); प्राग्दक्षिणश्च (prāgdakṣiṇaśca) – and facing east and south (प्राक्:east | दक्षिण:south | च:and); वामनः (vāmanaḥ) – Vāmana; सिद्धयोगी (siddhayogī) – perfected yogi (सिद्ध:perfected | योगी:yogi); महर्षिश्च (maharṣiśca) – and great sage (महर्षि:great sage | च:and); सिद्धार्थः (siddhārthaḥ) – one who has achieved goals; सिद्धसाधकः (siddhasādhakaḥ) – accomplished practitioner (सिद्ध:accomplished | साधक:practitioner);

contentBlocks.original:
भिक्षुश्च भिक्षुरूपश्च विपणो मृदुरव्ययः ।
महासेनो विशाखश्च षष्टिभागो गवां पतिः ॥ ४२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhikṣuśca bhikṣurūpaśca vipaṇō mr̥duravyayaḥ |
mahāsēnō viśākhaśca ṣaṣṭibhāgō gavāṁ patiḥ || 42 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Mendicant (Bhikṣu), the Mendicant-form (Bhikṣurūpa), the Trader (Vipaṇa), the Gentle (Mṛdu), the Imperishable (Avyaya), the Great Commander (Mahāsena), Viśākha (the forked one), the Sixtieth Part (Ṣaṣṭibhāga), the Lord of Cows (Gavāṁ Pati). (42)
contentBlocks.meanings: भिक्षुश्च (bhikṣuśca) – and the mendicant; भिक्षुरूपश्च (bhikṣurūpaśca) – and in mendicant form (भिक्षु:mendicant | रूप:form | च:and); विपणो (vipaṇo) – merchant; मृदुरव्ययः (mṛduravyayaḥ) – gentle and imperishable (मृदु:gentle | अव्यय:imperishable); महासेनो (mahāseno) – great army; विशाखश्च (viśākhaśca) – and Viśākha; षष्टिभागो (ṣaṣṭibhāgo) – sixtieth part (षष्टि:sixty | भाग:part); गवां (gavāṁ) – of cows; पतिः (patiḥ) – lord;

contentBlocks.original:
वज्रहस्तश्च विष्कम्भी चमूस्तम्भन एव च ।
वृत्तावृत्तकरस्तालो मधुर्मधुकलोचनः ॥ ४३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vajrahastaśca viṣkambhī camūstambhana ēva ca |
vr̥ttāvr̥ttakarastālō madhurmadhukalōcanaḥ || 43 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Thunderbolt-handed (Vajrahasta), the Pillar Immobilizing Armies (Viṣkambhī), the Stupefier of Armies (Camūstambhana), the Round and Circular (Vṛttāvṛttakara), the Palm (Tāla), the Sweet (Madhur), the Honey-eyed (Madhukalōcana). (43)
contentBlocks.meanings: वज्रहस्तश्च (vajrahastaśca) – with a thunderbolt in hand (वज्र:thunderbolt | हस्त:hand | च:and); विष्कम्भी (viṣkambhī) – obstructing; चमूस्तम्भन (camūstambhana) – army stopper (चमू:army | स्तम्भन:stopper); एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; वृत्तावृत्तकरस्तालो (vṛttāvṛttakarastālo) – round and round like a cymbal (वृत्त:round | अवृत्त:not round | कर:maker | ताल:cymbal); मधुर्मधुकलोचनः (madhurmadhukalocanaḥ) – sweet with honey-like eyes (मधु:honey | मधुक:honey-like | लोचन:eyes);

contentBlocks.original:
वाचस्पत्यो वाजसनो नित्यमाश्रमपूजितः । [नित्यमाश्रितपूजितः]
ब्रह्मचारी लोकचारी सर्वचारी विचारवित् ॥ ४४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vācaspatyō vājasanō nityamāśramapūjitaḥ | [nityamāśritapūjitaḥ]
brahmacārī lōkacārī sarvacārī vicāravit || 44 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Lord of Speech (Vācaspati), the Food-giver (Vājasana), the Ever-worshipped by Āśramas (Nityamāśramapūjita), the Celibate Student (Brahmacārī), the World-wanderer (Lokacārī), the All-wanderer (Sarvacārī), the Knower of Reasoning (Vicāravit). (44)
contentBlocks.meanings: वाचस्पत्यो (vācaspatiyo) – of Vācaspati; वाजसनो (vājasano) – of Vājāsana; नित्यमाश्रमपूजितः (nityamāśramapūjitaḥ) – always revered in hermitages (नित्य:always | आश्रम:hermitage | पूजितः:revered); ब्रह्मचारी (brahmacārī) – celibate student; लोकचारी (lokacārī) – moving in the world; सर्वचारी (sarvacārī) – moving everywhere; विचारवित् (vicāravit) – knower of reflection;

contentBlocks.original:
ईशान ईश्वरः कालो निशाचारी पिनाकभृत् ।
निमित्तस्थो निमित्तं च नन्दिर्नन्दिकरो हरिः ॥ ४५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
īśāna īśvaraḥ kālō niśācārī pinākabhr̥t |
nimittasthō nimittaṁ ca nandirnandikarō hariḥ || 45 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Īśāna (the ruling one), the Lord (Īśvara), Time (Kāla), the Night-wanderer (Niśācārī), the Pinaka-holder (Pinākabhṛt), the Cause itself (Nimittastha), the Cause (Nimitta), Nandī (the joyful), the Joy-maker (Nandikara), Hari. (45)
contentBlocks.meanings: ईशान (īśāna) – lord; ईश्वरः (īśvaraḥ) – supreme controller; कालो (kālo) – time; निशाचारी (niśācārī) – night wanderer; पिनाकभृत् (pinākabhṛt) – bearer of Pinaka (पिनाक:Pinaka (Shiva's bow) | भृत्:bearer); निमित्तस्थो (nimittastho) – abiding in cause (निमित्त:cause | स्थो:abiding); निमित्तं (nimittaṁ) – cause; च (ca) – and; नन्दिर्नन्दिकरो (nandirnandikaro) – Nandi, joy-giver (नन्दि:Nandi | नन्दिकर:joy-giver); हरिः (hariḥ) – Vishnu;

contentBlocks.original:
नन्दीश्वरश्च नन्दी च नन्दनो नन्दिवर्धनः ।
भगहारी निहन्ता च कालो ब्रह्मा पितामहः ॥ ४६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nandīśvaraśca nandī ca nandanō nandivardhanaḥ |
bhagahārī nihantā ca kālō brahmā pitāmahaḥ || 46 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Lord of Nandī (Nandīśvara), Nandī, the Rejoicing (Nandana), the Augmenter of Joy (Nandivarddhana), the Remover of Fortune (Bhagahārī), the Slayer (Nihantā), Time (Kāla), Brahmā (the creator), the Grandfather (Pitāmaha). (46)
contentBlocks.meanings: नन्दीश्वरश्च (nandīśvaraśca) – and lord of Nandi (नन्दीश्वर:lord of Nandi | च:and); नन्दी (nandī) – Nandi; च (ca) – and; नन्दनो (nandano) – son of Nanda; नन्दिवर्धनः (nandivardhanaḥ) – increaser of joy; भगहारी (bhagahārī) – remover of fortune; निहन्ता (nihantā) – destroyer; च (ca) – and; कालो (kālo) – time; ब्रह्मा (brahmā) – Brahma; पितामहः (pitāmahaḥ) – grandfather;

contentBlocks.original:
चतुर्मुखो महालिङ्गश्चारुलिङ्गस्तथैव च ।
लिङ्गाध्यक्षः सुराध्यक्षो योगाध्यक्षो युगावहः ॥ ४७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
caturmukhō mahāliṅgaścāruliṅgastathaiva ca |
liṅgādhyakṣaḥ surādhyakṣō yōgādhyakṣō yugāvahaḥ || 47 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Four-faced (Caturmukha), the Great Liṅga (Mahāliṅga), the Graceful Liṅga (Cāruliṅga), the Overseer of Liṅgas (Liṅgādhyakṣa), the Overseer of the Gods (Surādhyakṣa), the Overseer of Yoga (Yogādhyakṣa), the Bearer of the Age (Yugāvaha). (47)
contentBlocks.meanings: चतुर्मुखो (caturmukho) – four-faced; महालिङ्गश्चारुलिङ्गस्तथैव (mahāliṅgaścāruliṅgastathaiva) – great and beautiful liṅga (महालिङ्ग:great liṅga | चारुलिङ्ग:beautiful liṅga | तथैव:and also); च (ca) – and; लिङ्गाध्यक्षः (liṅgādhyakṣaḥ) – overseer of liṅga; सुराध्यक्षो (surādhyakṣo) – overseer of gods; योगाध्यक्षो (yogādhyakṣo) – overseer of yoga; युगावहः (yugāvahaḥ) – bringer of ages;

contentBlocks.original:
बीजाध्यक्षो बीजकर्ता अध्यात्मानुगतो बलः ।
इतिहासः सकल्पश्च गौतमोऽथ निशाकरः ॥ ४८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bījādhyakṣō bījakartā adhyātmānugatō balaḥ |
itihāsaḥ sakalpaśca gautamō:’tha niśākaraḥ || 48 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Overseer of the Seed (Bījādhyakṣa), the Seed-maker (Bījakartā), the One who follows the Inner Self (Adhyātmānugata), Strength (Bala), the Tale (Itihāsa), Purpose (Sakalpa), Gautama (the great sage), the Moon (Niśākara). (48)
contentBlocks.meanings: बीजाध्यक्षो (bījādhyakṣaḥ) – overseer of seeds (बीज:seed | अध्यक्ष:overseer); बीजकर्ता (bījakartā) – creator of seeds (बीज:seed | कर्ता:creator); अध्यात्मानुगतो (adhyātmānugataḥ) – follower of spirituality (अध्यात्म:spirituality | अनुगत:follower); बलः (balaḥ) – strength; इतिहासः (itihāsaḥ) – history; सकल्पश्च (sakalpaśca) – and with resolve (सकल्प:resolve | च:and); गौतमोऽथ (gautamo'tha) – Gautama and then (गौतम:Gautama | अथ:then); निशाकरः (niśākaraḥ) – moon;

contentBlocks.original:
दम्भो ह्यदम्भो वैदम्भो वश्यो वशकरः कलिः ।
लोककर्ता पशुपतिर्महाकर्ता ह्यनौषधः ॥ ४९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dambhō hyadambhō vaidambhō vaśyō vaśakaraḥ kaliḥ |
lōkakartā paśupatirmahākartā hyanauṣadhaḥ || 49 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Pride (Dambha), Freedom from Pride (Adambha), the Semblance of Pride (Vaidambha), the Tame (Vaśya), the Tamer (Vaśakara), Discord (Kali), the World-maker (Lokakartā), the Lord of Creatures (Paśupati), the Great Maker (Mahākartā), the Non-medicine (Anauṣadha). (49)
contentBlocks.meanings: दम्भो (dambho) – hypocrisy; ह्यदम्भो (hyadambho) – non-hypocrisy; वैदम्भो (vaidambho) – true non-hypocrisy; वश्यो (vaśyo) – controllable; वशकरः (vaśakaraḥ) – controller; कलिः (kaliḥ) – Kali (demon); लोककर्ता (lokakartā) – creator of the world (लोक:world | कर्ता:creator); पशुपतिर्महाकर्ता (paśupatirmahākartā) – great creator, lord of beings (पशुपति:lord of beings | महाकर्ता:great creator); ह्यनौषधः (hyanuṣadhaḥ) – without medicine;

contentBlocks.original:
अक्षरं परमं ब्रह्म बलवच्छक्र एव च ।
नीतिर्ह्यनीतिः शुद्धात्मा शुद्धो मान्यो गतागतः ॥ ५० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
akṣaraṁ paramaṁ brahma balavacchakra ēva ca |
nītirhyanītiḥ śuddhātmā śuddhō mānyō gatāgataḥ || 50 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Imperishable (Akṣara), the Supreme Brahman (Paramaṁ Brahma), Strength itself like a Wheel (Balavaccakra), Policy (Nīti), Improper Policy (Anīti), the Pure Self (Śuddhātmā), the Pure (Śuddha), the Worthy of Honour (Mānya), the Coming and Going (Gatāgata). (50)
contentBlocks.meanings: अक्षरं (akṣaraṁ) – imperishable; परमं (paramaṁ) – supreme; ब्रह्म (brahma) – Brahman; बलवच्छक्र (balavacchakra) – mighty Indra (बलवत्:mighty | शक्र:Indra); एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; नीतिर्ह्यनीतिः (nītirhyanītiḥ) – policy and non-policy (नीतिः:policy | अनीतिः:non-policy); शुद्धात्मा (śuddhātmā) – pure-souled (शुद्ध:pure | आत्मा:soul); शुद्धो (śuddho) – pure; मान्यो (mānyo) – honorable; गतागतः (gatāgataḥ) – coming and going (गति:coming | आगत:going);

contentBlocks.original:
बहुप्रसादः सुस्वप्नो दर्पणोऽथ त्वमित्रजित् ।
वेदकारो मन्त्रकारो विद्वान् समरमर्दनः ॥ ५१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bahuprasādaḥ susvapnō darpaṇō:’tha tvamitrajit |
vēdakārō mantrakārō vidvān samaramardanaḥ || 51 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Abundantly Gracious (Bahuprasāda), the Sweet Dream (Susvapna), the Mirror (Darpaṇa), the Conqueror of Enemies (Amitrajit), the Veda-maker (Vedakāra), the Mantra-maker (Mantrakāra), the Learned (Vidvān), the Crusher in Battle (Samaramardana). (51)
contentBlocks.meanings: बहुप्रसादः (bahuprasādaḥ) – very gracious; सुस्वप्नो (susvapno) – good dream; दर्पणोऽथ (darpaṇo'tha) – mirror and; त्वमित्रजित् (tvamitrajit) – conqueror of enemies; वेदकारो (vedakāro) – creator of the Vedas; मन्त्रकारो (mantrakāro) – creator of mantras; विद्वान् (vidvān) – wise; समरमर्दनः (samaramardanaḥ) – crusher of battles (समर:battle | मर्दनः:crusher);

contentBlocks.original:
महामेघनिवासी च महाघोरो वशीकरः ।
अग्निज्वालो महाज्वालो अतिधूम्रो हुतो हविः ॥ ५२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahāmēghanivāsī ca mahāghōrō vaśīkaraḥ |
agnijvālō mahājvālō atidhūmrō hutō haviḥ || 52 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Dweller in Great Clouds (Mahāmeghavāsī), the Very Terrible (Mahāghora), the Subduer (Vaśīkara), the Fire-flame (Agnijvāla), the Great Flame (Mahājvāla), the Very Smoky (Atidhūmra), the Offered (Huta), the Oblation (Haviḥ). (52)
contentBlocks.meanings: महामेघनिवासी (mahāmeghanivāsī) – dweller in great clouds (महामेघ:great cloud | निवासी:dweller); च (ca) – and; महाघोरो (mahāghoro) – very terrifying; वशीकरः (vaśīkaraḥ) – enchanter; अग्निज्वालो (agnijvālo) – fire flame (अग्नि:fire | ज्वालो:flame); महाज्वालो (mahājvālo) – great flame (मह:great | ज्वालो:flame); अतिधूम्रो (atidhūmro) – very smoky; हुतो (huto) – offered; हविः (haviḥ) – oblation;

contentBlocks.original:
वृषणः शङ्करो नित्यवर्चस्वी धूमकेतनः ।
नीलस्तथाङ्गलुब्धश्च शोभनो निरवग्रहः ॥ ५३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vr̥ṣaṇaḥ śaṅkarō nityavarcasvī dhūmakētanaḥ |
nīlastathāṅgalubdhaśca śōbhanō niravagrahaḥ || 53 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Bull (Vṛṣaṇa), the Beneficent (Śaṅkara), the Ever-radiant (Nityavarcasvī), the Smoke-bannered (Dhūmaketana), the Blue one (Nīla), the Limbed (Aṅga), the Greedy (Lubdha), the Auspicious (Śobhana), the Unimpeded (Niravagraha). (53)
contentBlocks.meanings: वृषणः (vṛṣaṇaḥ) – virile; शङ्करो (śaṅkaro) – Shankara; नित्यवर्चस्वी (nityavarcasvī) – eternally glorious (नित्य:eternal | वर्चस्वी:glorious); धूमकेतनः (dhūmaketanaḥ) – having smoke as a banner (धूम:smoke | केतनः:banner); नीलस्तथाङ्गलुब्धश्च (nīlastathāṅgalubdhaśca) – blue and desirous of limbs (नील:blue | तथा:and | अङ्गलुब्ध:desirous of limbs | च:also); शोभनो (śobhano) – beautiful; निरवग्रहः (niravagrahaḥ) – unobstructed (निर:without | अवग्रहः:obstruction);

contentBlocks.original:
स्वस्तिदः स्वस्तिभावश्च भागी भागकरो लघुः ।
उत्सङ्गश्च महाङ्गश्च महागर्भपरायणः ॥ ५४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
svastidaḥ svastibhāvaśca bhāgī bhāgakarō laghuḥ |
utsaṅgaśca mahāṅgaśca mahāgarbhaparāyaṇaḥ || 54 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Welfare-giver (Svastida), the Welfare itself (Svastibhāva), the Prosperous (Bhāgī), the Prosperity-maker (Bhāgakara), the Light (Laghu), the Embracing (Utsaṅga), the Vast-limbed (Mahāṅga), the Womb of the Great (Mahāgarbhaparāyaṇa). (54)
contentBlocks.meanings: स्वस्तिदः (svastidaḥ) – giver of welfare (स्वस्ति:welfare | दः:giver); स्वस्तिभावश्च (svastibhāvaśca) – and state of welfare (स्वस्ति:welfare | भाव:state | च:and); भागी (bhāgī) – partaker; भागकरो (bhāgakaro) – distributor of shares (भाग:share | करः:maker); लघुः (laghuḥ) – light; उत्सङ्गश्च (utsaṅgaśca) – and embrace (उत्सङ्ग:embrace | च:and); महाङ्गश्च (mahāṅgaśca) – and great-bodied (मह:great | अङ्ग:body | च:and); महागर्भपरायणः (mahāgarbhaparāyaṇaḥ) – devoted to great womb (मह:great | गर्भ:womb | परायणः:devoted);

contentBlocks.original:
कृष्णवर्णः सुवर्णश्च इन्द्रियं सर्वदेहिनाम् ।
महापादो महाहस्तो महाकायो महायशाः ॥ ५५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kr̥ṣṇavarṇaḥ suvarṇaśca indriyaṁ sarvadēhinām |
mahāpādō mahāhastō mahākāyō mahāyaśāḥ || 55 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Dark-coloured (Kṛṣṇavarṇa), the Golden (Suvarṇa), the Sense-organ of All Embodied Beings (Indriyaṁ Sarvadehinām), the Vast-footed (Mahāpāda), the Vast-handed (Mahāhasta), the Vast-bodied (Mahākāya), the Greatly Renowned (Mahāyaśa). (55)
contentBlocks.meanings: कृष्णवर्णः (kṛṣṇavarṇaḥ) – dark-complexioned (कृष्ण:dark | वर्णः:complexion); सुवर्णश्च (suvarṇaśca) – and golden (सुवर्ण:golden | च:and); इन्द्रियं (indriyaṁ) – sense organ; सर्वदेहिनाम् (sarvadehinām) – of all embodied beings (सर्व:all | देहिनाम्:of embodied beings); महापादो (mahāpādo) – having great feet (मह:great | पादो:feet); महाहस्तो (mahāhasto) – having great hands (मह:great | हस्तो:hands); महाकायो (mahākāyo) – having a great body (मह:great | कायो:body); महायशाः (mahāyaśāḥ) – having great fame (मह:great | यशाः:fame);

contentBlocks.original:
महामूर्धा महामात्रो महानेत्रो निशालयः ।
महान्तको महाकर्णो महोष्ठश्च महाहनुः ॥ ५६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahāmūrdhā mahāmātrō mahānētrō niśālayaḥ |
mahāntakō mahākarṇō mahōṣṭhaśca mahāhanuḥ || 56 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Vast-headed (Mahāmūrdha), the Great Measure (Mahāmātra), the Vast-eyed (Mahānetra), the Night-dwelling (Niśālaya), the Great Ender (Mahāntaka), the Vast-eared (Mahākarṇa), the Vast-lipped (Mahoṣṭha), the Vast-jawed (Mahāhanu). (56)
contentBlocks.meanings: महामूर्धा (mahāmūrdhā) – great-headed (मह:great | मूर्धा:head); महामात्रो (mahāmātro) – great measure (मह:great | मात्रो:measure); महानेत्रो (mahānetro) – great-eyed (मह:great | नेत्रो:eye); निशालयः (niśālayaḥ) – abode of night (निशा:night | आलयः:abode); महान्तको (mahāntako) – great end (मह:great | अन्तको:end); महाकर्णो (mahākarṇo) – great-eared (मह:great | कर्णो:ear); महोष्ठश्च (mahoṣṭhaśca) – and great-lipped (मह:great | उष्ठ:lip | च:and); महाहनुः (mahāhanuḥ) – great-jawed (मह:great | हनुः:jaw);

contentBlocks.original:
महानासो महाकम्बुर्महाग्रीवः श्मशानभाक् ।
महावक्षा महोरस्को ह्यन्तरात्मा मृगालयः ॥ ५७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahānāsō mahākamburmahāgrīvaḥ śmaśānabhāk |
mahāvakṣā mahōraskō hyantarātmā mr̥gālayaḥ || 57 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Vast-nosed (Mahānāsa), the Great Shell-necked (Mahākambu), the Great-necked (Mahāgrīva), the Haunter of Cremation Grounds (Śmaśānabhāk), the Vast-chested (Mahāvakṣā), the Vast-torso (Mahorasko), the Inner Self (Antārātmā), the Deer-dwelling (Mṛgālaya). (57)
contentBlocks.meanings: महानासो (mahānāsaḥ) – great-nosed; महाकम्बुर्महाग्रीवः (mahākamburmahāgrīvaḥ) – great-necked (महाकम्बुः:great conch | महाग्रीवः:great neck); श्मशानभाक् (śmaśānabhāk) – dweller in cremation grounds (श्मशान:cremation ground | भाक्:dweller); महावक्षा (mahāvakṣā) – broad-chested; महोरस्को (mahorasko) – broad-chested; ह्यन्तरात्मा (hyantarātmā) – inner self; मृगालयः (mṛgālayaḥ) – abode of animals;

contentBlocks.original:
लम्बनो लम्बितोष्ठश्च महामायः पयोनिधिः ।
महादन्तो महादंष्ट्रो महाजिह्वो महामुखः ॥ ५८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lambanō lambitōṣṭhaśca mahāmāyaḥ payōnidhiḥ |
mahādantō mahādaṁṣṭrō mahājihvō mahāmukhaḥ || 58 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Hanging (Lambana), the Hanging-lipped (Lambitoṣṭha), the Great Illusionist (Mahāmāya), the Ocean of Milk (Payōnidhi), the Great-toothed (Mahādanta), the Great-fanged (Mahādaṁṣṭra), the Great-tongued (Mahājihva), the Vast-mouthed (Mahāmukha). (58)
contentBlocks.meanings: लम्बनो (lambano) – supporter; लम्बितोष्ठश्च (lambitoṣṭhaśca) – with hanging lips (लम्बित:hanging | ओष्ठ:lips | च:and); महामायः (mahāmāyaḥ) – great illusionist; पयोनिधिः (payonidhiḥ) – ocean; महादन्तो (mahādanto) – having great teeth; महादंष्ट्रो (mahādaṃṣṭro) – having great fangs; महाजिह्वो (mahājihvo) – having a great tongue; महामुखः (mahāmukhaḥ) – having a great mouth;

contentBlocks.original:
महानखो महारोमा महाकेशो महाजटः ।
प्रसन्नश्च प्रसादश्च प्रत्ययो गिरिसाधनः ॥ ५९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahānakhō mahārōmā mahākēśō mahājaṭaḥ |
prasannaśca prasādaśca pratyayō girisādhanaḥ || 59 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Great-nailed (Mahānakha), the Great-haired (Mahāromā), the Great-haired crown (Mahākeśa), the Great Matted-hair (Mahājaṭa), the Serene (Prasanna), Grace (Prasāda), Conviction (Pratyaya), the Mountain-Sādhana (Girisādhana). (59)
contentBlocks.meanings: महानखो (mahānakho) – great nails (महान्:great | नखः:nail); महारोमा (mahāromā) – great hair (महान्:great | रोम:hair); महाकेशो (mahākeśo) – great hair (महान्:great | केशः:hair); महाजटः (mahājaṭaḥ) – great matted hair (महान्:great | जटः:matted hair); प्रसन्नश्च (prasannaśca) – and serene (प्रसन्नः:serene | च:and); प्रसादश्च (prasādaśca) – and grace (प्रसादः:grace | च:and); प्रत्ययो (pratyayo) – confidence; गिरिसाधनः (girisādhanaḥ) – mountain-dweller (गिरि:mountain | साधनः:dweller);

contentBlocks.original:
स्नेहनोऽस्नेहनश्चैव अजितश्च महामुनिः ।
वृक्षाकारो वृक्षकेतुरनलो वायुवाहनः ॥ ६० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
snēhanō:’snēhanaścaiva ajitaśca mahāmuniḥ |
vr̥kṣākārō vr̥kṣakēturanalō vāyuvāhanaḥ || 60 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Affectionate (Snehana), the Non-affectionate (Asnehana), the Unconquered (Ajita), the Great Sage (Mahāmuni), the Tree-form (Vṛkṣākāra), the Tree-bannered (Vṛkṣaketu), Fire (Anala), the Wind-rider (Vāyuvāhana). (60)
contentBlocks.meanings: स्नेहनोऽस्नेहनश्चैव (snehanosnehanascaiva) – both affectionate and unaffectionate (स्नेहनः:affectionate | अस्नेहनः:unaffectionate | च:and | एव:indeed); अजितश्च (ajitaśca) – and unconquered (अजितः:unconquered | च:and); महामुनिः (mahāmuniḥ) – great sage; वृक्षाकारो (vṛkṣākāro) – tree-shaped (वृक्ष:tree | आकारः:shape); वृक्षकेतुरनलो (vṛkṣaketuranalo) – tree-bannered and fire (वृक्षकेतुः:tree-bannered | अनलः:fire); वायुवाहनः (vāyuvāhanaḥ) – wind carrier (वायु:wind | वाहनः:carrier);

contentBlocks.original:
गण्डली मेरुधामा च देवाधिपतिरेव च ।
अथर्वशीर्षः सामास्य ऋक्सहस्रामितेक्षणः ॥ ६१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gaṇḍalī mērudhāmā ca dēvādhipatirēva ca |
atharvaśīrṣaḥ sāmāsya r̥ksahasrāmitēkṣaṇaḥ || 61 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Cheek-jewelled (Gaṇḍalī), the Abode of Meru (Merudhāmā), the Lord of the Gods (Devādhipati), the Atharva-headed (Atharvaśīrṣa), the Sāma-faced (Sāmāsya), the Thousand-eyed Ṛg (Ṛksahasrāmitekṣaṇa). (61)
contentBlocks.meanings: गण्डली (gaṇḍalī) – a kind of serpent; मेरुधामा (merudhāmā) – abode of Meru (मेरु:Meru | धामा:abode); च (ca) – and; देवाधिपतिरेव (devādhipatireva) – indeed the lord of gods (देव:god | अधिपति:lord | एव:indeed); च (ca) – and; अथर्वशीर्षः (atharvaśīrṣaḥ) – Atharvaśīrṣa; सामास्य (sāmāsya) – having Sāma as face (साम:Sāma | आस्य:face); ऋक्सहस्रामितेक्षणः (ṛksahasrāmitekṣaṇaḥ) – thousand-eyed with Rigveda (ऋक्:Rigveda | सहस्र:thousand | अमित:immeasurable | ईक्षणः:eyes);

contentBlocks.original:
यजुः पादभुजो गुह्यः प्रकाशो जङ्गमस्तथा ।
अमोघार्थः प्रसादश्च अभिगम्यः सुदर्शनः ॥ ६२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yajuḥ pādabhujō guhyaḥ prakāśō jaṅgamastathā |
amōghārthaḥ prasādaśca abhigamyaḥ sudarśanaḥ || 62 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Yajur-footed-armed (Yajuḥ Pādabhuja), the Secret (Guhya), the Luminous (Prakāśa), the Moving (Jaṅgama), the Fruitful Purpose (Amōghārtha), Grace (Prasāda), the Approachable (Abhigamya), the Auspicious of Vision (Sudarśana). (62)
contentBlocks.meanings: यजुः (yajuḥ) – Yajur Veda; पादभुजो (pādabhujaḥ) – having feet as arms (पाद:foot | भुज:arm); गुह्यः (guhyaḥ) – secret; प्रकाशो (prakāśaḥ) – manifest; जङ्गमस्तथा (jaṅgamastathā) – and also moving (जङ्गम:moving | तथा:also); अमोघार्थः (amoghārthaḥ) – infallible purpose (अमोग:infallible | अर्थ:purpose); प्रसादश्च (prasādaśca) – and grace (प्रसाद:grace | च:and); अभिगम्यः (abhigamyaḥ) – approachable; सुदर्शनः (sudarśanaḥ) – beautiful to behold;

contentBlocks.original:
उपकारः प्रियः सर्वः कनकः काञ्चनच्छविः ।
नाभिर्नन्दिकरो भावः पुष्करस्थपतिः स्थिरः ॥ ६३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
upakāraḥ priyaḥ sarvaḥ kanakaḥ kāñcanacchaviḥ |
nābhirnandikarō bhāvaḥ puṣkarasthapatiḥ sthiraḥ || 63 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Benefactor (Upakāra), the Beloved (Priya), the All (Sarva), Gold (Kanaka), the Golden-hued (Kāñcanacchaviḥ), the Navel (Nābhi), the Joy-maker (Nandikara), Existence (Bhāva), the Lord of the Lotus-station (Puṣkarasthapati), the Steadfast (Sthira). (63)
contentBlocks.meanings: उपकारः (upakāraḥ) – favor; प्रियः (priyaḥ) – dear; सर्वः (sarvaḥ) – all; कनकः (kanakaḥ) – gold; काञ्चनच्छविः (kāñcanacchaviḥ) – golden-hued; नाभिर्नन्दिकरो (nābhirnandikaro) – navel joy-giver (नाभिः:navel | नन्दिकरः:joy-giver); भावः (bhāvaḥ) – state; पुष्करस्थपतिः (puṣkarasthapatiḥ) – lord of Pushkara (पुष्कर:Pushkara | स्थपति:lord); स्थिरः (sthiraḥ) – steady;

contentBlocks.original:
द्वादशस्त्रासनश्चाद्यो यज्ञो यज्ञसमाहितः ।
नक्तं कलिश्च कालश्च मकरः कालपूजितः ॥ ६४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dvādaśastrāsanaścādyō yajñō yajñasamāhitaḥ |
naktaṁ kaliśca kālaśca makaraḥ kālapūjitaḥ || 64 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Twelvefold Terrifying (Dvādaśatrāsana), the Primordial (Ādya), the Sacrifice (Yajña), the Sacrifice-absorbed (Yajñasamāhita), the Night (Naktam), Discord (Kali), Time (Kāla), the Makara (the sea-beast), the Time-worshipped (Kālapūjita). (64)
contentBlocks.meanings: द्वादशस्त्रासनश्चाद्यो (dvādaśastrāsanaścādyo) – first of twelve seats (द्वादश:twelve | आसन:seat | च:and | आद्य:first); यज्ञो (yajño) – sacrifice; यज्ञसमाहितः (yajñasamāhitaḥ) – absorbed in sacrifice (यज्ञ:sacrifice | समाहित:absorbed); नक्तं (naktaṁ) – night; कलिश्च (kaliśca) – and Kali (कलि:Kali | च:and); कालश्च (kālaśca) – and time (काल:time | च:and); मकरः (makaraḥ) – crocodile; कालपूजितः (kālapūjitaḥ) – worshipped by time (काल:time | पूजित:worshipped);

contentBlocks.original:
सगणो गणकारश्च भूतवाहनसारथिः ।
भस्मशयो भस्मगोप्ता भस्मभूतस्तरुर्गणः ॥ ६५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sagaṇō gaṇakāraśca bhūtavāhanasārathiḥ |
bhasmaśayō bhasmagōptā bhasmabhūtastarurgaṇaḥ || 65 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The One with a Host (Sagaṇa), the Host-maker (Gaṇakāra), the Charioteer of Ghost-vehicles (Bhūtavāhanasārathi), the Ash-bedded (Bhasmaśaya), the Ash-guarded (Bhasmagoptā), the One Become Ash (Bhasmabhūta), the Tree-host (Tarugaṇa). (65)
contentBlocks.meanings: सगणो (sagaṇaḥ) – with attendants; गणकारश्च (gaṇakāraśca) – creator of groups (गणकार:creator of groups | च:and); भूतवाहनसारथिः (bhūtavāhanasārathiḥ) – charioteer of spirits (भूतवाहन:carrier of spirits | सारथिः:charioteer); भस्मशयो (bhasmaśayaḥ) – lying on ashes; भस्मगोप्ता (bhasmagoptā) – protector of ashes; भस्मभूतस्तरुर्गणः (bhasmabhūtastarurgaṇaḥ) – group of ash-become trees (भस्मभूत:become ashes | स्तरु:tree | गणः:group);

contentBlocks.original:
लोकपालस्तथाऽलोको महात्मा सर्वपूजितः ।
शुक्लस्त्रिशुक्लः सम्पन्नः शुचिर्भूतनिषेवितः ॥ ६६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lōkapālastathā:’lōkō mahātmā sarvapūjitaḥ |
śuklastriśuklaḥ sampannaḥ śucirbhūtaniṣēvitaḥ || 66 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The World-guardian (Lokapāla), likewise the Illumined (Aloka), the Great Soul (Mahātmā), the Universally Worshipped (Sarvapūjita), the White (Śukla), the Triply Pure (Triśukla), the Complete (Sampanna), the Pure (Śuci), the Beings-served (Bhūtaniṣevita). (66)
contentBlocks.meanings: लोकपालस्तथाऽलोको (lokapālastathā'loko) – protector of the world and beyond (लोकपाल:protector of the world | तथा:and | अलोक:beyond the world); महात्मा (mahātmā) – great soul; सर्वपूजितः (sarvapūjitaḥ) – worshipped by all; शुक्लस्त्रिशुक्लः (śuklastriśuklaḥ) – pure and thrice pure (शुक्ल:pure | त्रिशुक्ल:thrice pure); सम्पन्नः (sampannaḥ) – endowed; शुचिर्भूतनिषेवितः (śucirbhūtaniṣevitaḥ) – pure, served by beings (शुचि:pure | भूत:beings | निषेवितः:served by);

contentBlocks.original:
आश्रमस्थः क्रियावस्थो विश्वकर्ममतिर्वरः ।
विशालशाखस्ताम्रोष्ठो ह्यम्बुजालः सुनिश्चलः ॥ ६७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āśramasthaḥ kriyāvasthō viśvakarmamatirvaraḥ |
viśālaśākhastāmrōṣṭhō hyambujālaḥ suniścalaḥ || 67 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Āśrama-dwelling (Āśramastha), the Action-poised (Kriyāvastha), the Foremost in Viśvakarman's Wisdom (Viśvakarmamatīvara), the Wide-branched (Viśālaśākha), the Copper-lipped (Tāmroṣṭha), the Lotus-net (Ambujāla), the Very Steady (Suniścala). (67)
contentBlocks.meanings: आश्रमस्थः (āśramasthaḥ) – dwelling in hermitage (आश्रम:hermitage | स्थः:dwelling); क्रियावस्थो (kriyāvastho) – engaged in duties (क्रिया:duties | अवस्थः:engaged); विश्वकर्ममतिर्वरः (viśvakarmamatirvaraḥ) – best with universal skill and mind (विश्वकर्म:universal skill | मतिः:mind | वरः:best); विशालशाखस्ताम्रोष्ठो (viśālaśākhatāmroṣṭho) – wide-branched, copper-lipped (विशाल:wide | शाख:branched | ताम्र:copper | ओष्ठः:lipped); ह्यम्बुजालः (hyambujālaḥ) – having water network (ह्य:having | अम्बु:water | जालः:network); सुनिश्चलः (suniścalaḥ) – very steady (सु:very | निश्चलः:steady);

contentBlocks.original:
कपिलः कपिशः शुक्ल आयुश्चैव परोः ।
गन्धर्वो ह्यदितिस्तार्क्ष्यः सुविज्ञेयः सुशारदः ॥ ६८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kapilaḥ kapiśaḥ śukla āyuścaiva parōḥ |
gandharvō hyaditistārkṣyaḥ suvijñēyaḥ suśāradaḥ || 68 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Kapila (the tawny one), the Tawny-hued (Kapiśa), the White (Śukla), Life (Āyus), the Supreme Beyond (Para), the Gandharva (celestial musician), Aditi, Tārkṣya (Garuḍa), the Easily Known (Suvijñeya), the Skilled in the Auspicious (Suśārada). (68)
contentBlocks.meanings: कपिलः (kapilaḥ) – Kapila; कपिशः (kapiśaḥ) – brown; शुक्ल (śukla) – white; आयुश्चैव (āyuścaiva) – and indeed life (आयुः:life | च:and | एव:indeed); परः (paraḥ) – beyond; गन्धर्वो (gandharvo) – Gandharva; ह्यदितिस्तार्क्ष्यः (hyaditistārkṣyaḥ) – indeed Aditya and Tarkshya (हि:indeed | अदितिः:Aditya | तार्क्ष्यः:Tarkshya); सुविज्ञेयः (suvijñeyaḥ) – well-known; सुशारदः (suśāradaḥ) – very skillful;

contentBlocks.original:
परश्वधायुधो देवो ह्यनुकारी सुबान्धवः ।
तुम्बवीणो महाक्रोध ऊर्ध्वरेता जलेशयः ॥ ६९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
paraśvadhāyudhō dēvō hyanukārī subāndhavaḥ |
tumbavīṇō mahākrōdha ūrdhvarētā jalēśayaḥ || 69 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Axe-weaponed (Paraśvadhāyudha), the God (Deva), the Imitator (Anukārī), the Good-kinsman (Subāndhava), the Gourd-vīṇā player (Tumbavīṇa), the Greatly Wrathful (Mahākrodha), the Upward-seeded (Ūrdhvaretā), the Water-dwelling (Jaleśaya). (69)
contentBlocks.meanings: परश्वधायुधो (paraśvadhāyudho) – axe-weaponed (परश्वध:axe | आयुध:weapon); देवो (devo) – god; ह्यनुकारी (hyanukārī) – imitator; सुबान्धवः (subāndhavaḥ) – good friend (सु:good | बान्धव:friend); तुम्बवीणो (tumbavīṇo) – lute-holder (तुम्ब:lute | वीण:stringed instrument); महाक्रोध (mahākrodha) – great anger (मह:great | क्रोध:anger); ऊर्ध्वरेता (ūrdhvaretā) – ascetic; जलेशयः (jaleśayaḥ) – water-dweller (जल:water | शय:dweller);

contentBlocks.original:
उग्रो वंशकरो वंशो वंशनादो ह्यनिन्दितः ।
सर्वाङ्गरूपो मायावी सुहृदो ह्यनिलोऽनलः ॥ ७० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ugrō vaṁśakarō vaṁśō vaṁśanādō hyaninditaḥ |
sarvāṅgarūpō māyāvī suhr̥dō hyanilō:’nalaḥ || 70 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Fierce (Ugra), the Lineage-maker (Vaṁśakara), the Lineage (Vaṁśa), the Flute-sound (Vaṁśanāda), the Unblameable (Aninditā), the All-limbed Form (Sarvāṅgarūpa), the Illusionist (Māyāvī), the Good Friend (Suhṛda), the Wind (Anila), Fire (Anala). (70)
contentBlocks.meanings: उग्रो (ugraḥ) – fierce; वंशकरो (vaṃśakaraḥ) – creator of lineage (वंश:lineage | कर:maker); वंशो (vaṃśaḥ) – lineage; वंशनादो (vaṃśanādaḥ) – sound of lineage (वंश:lineage | नाद:sound); ह्यनिन्दितः (hyaninditaḥ) – blameless; सर्वाङ्गरूपो (sarvāṅgarūpaḥ) – having form of all limbs (सर्व:all | अङ्ग:limb | रूप:form); मायावी (māyāvī) – illusionist; सुहृदो (suhṛdaḥ) – friend; ह्यनिलोऽनलः (hyanilo'nalaḥ) – air and fire (अनिल:air | अनल:fire);

contentBlocks.original:
बन्धनो बन्धकर्ता च सुबन्धनविमोचनः ।
स यज्ञारिः स कामारिर्महादंष्ट्रो महायुधः ॥ ७१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bandhanō bandhakartā ca subandhanavimōcanaḥ |
sa yajñāriḥ sa kāmārirmahādaṁṣṭrō mahāyudhaḥ || 71 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Bondage (Bandhana), the Binder (Bandhakartā), the Liberator from Good Bonds (Subandhanavimocana), the Enemy of Sacrifice (Sa Yajñāri), the Enemy of Desire (Sa Kāmāri), the Great-fanged (Mahādaṁṣṭra), the Great Weapon (Mahāyudha). (71)
contentBlocks.meanings: बन्धनो (bandhano) – binder; बन्धकर्ता (bandhakartā) – creator of bonds (बन्ध:bond | कर्ता:creator); च (ca) – and; सुबन्धनविमोचनः (subandhanavimocanaḥ) – liberator from good bonds (सु:good | बन्धन:bond | विमोचनः:liberator); स (sa) – he; यज्ञारिः (yajñāriḥ) – enemy of sacrifices (यज्ञ:sacrifice | अरिः:enemy); स (sa) – he; कामारिर्महादंष्ट्रो (kāmārirmahādaṃṣṭro) – enemy of desires, great-fanged (काम:desire | अरिः:enemy | महादंष्ट्रः:great-fanged); महायुधः (mahāyudhaḥ) – great warrior;

contentBlocks.original:
बहुधा निन्दितः शर्वः शङ्करः शङ्करोऽधनः ।
अमरेशो महादेवो विश्वदेवः सुरारिहा ॥ ७२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bahudhā ninditaḥ śarvaḥ śaṅkaraḥ śaṅkarō:’dhanaḥ |
amarēśō mahādēvō viśvadēvaḥ surārihā || 72 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Variously censured (Bahudhāninditā), the Archer (Śarva), the Beneficent (Śaṅkara), the Beneficent (Śaṅkara) who gives no wealth, the Lord of the Immortals (Amareśa), the Great God (Mahādeva), the God of the Universe (Viśvadeva), the Slayer of Foes of the Gods (Surārihā). (72)
contentBlocks.meanings: बहुधा (bahudhā) – in many ways; निन्दितः (ninditaḥ) – criticized; शर्वः (śarvaḥ) – Śarva (Shiva); शङ्करः (śaṅkaraḥ) – Śaṅkara (Shiva); शङ्करोऽधनः (śaṅkaro'dhanaḥ) – Śaṅkara, the poor; अमरेशो (amareśo) – lord of immortals; महादेवो (mahādevo) – great god; विश्वदेवः (viśvadevaḥ) – god of the universe; सुरारिहा (surārihā) – destroyer of gods' enemies (सुर:gods | अरि:enemies | हा:destroyer);

contentBlocks.original:
अहिर्बुध्न्योऽनिलाभश्च चेकितानो हविस्तथा । [हरि]
अजैकपाच्च कापाली त्रिशङ्कुरजितः शिवः ॥ ७३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ahirbudhnyō:’nilābhaśca cēkitānō havistathā | [hari]
ajaikapācca kāpālī triśaṅkurajitaḥ śivaḥ || 73 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Ahirbudhnya (the serpent of the deep), the Wind-like (Anilābha), the Intelligent (Cekitāna), the Offering (Havis), the One-footed Goat (Ajaikapāt), the Skull-bearer (Kāpālī), Triśaṅku, the Unconquered (Ajita), the Auspicious (Śiva). (73)
contentBlocks.meanings: अहिर्बुध्न्योऽनिलाभश्च (ahirbudhnyo'nilābhaśca) – serpent-bottomed and air-like (अहिर्बुध्न्य:serpent-bottomed | अनिलाभः:air-like | च:and); चेकितानो (cekitāno) – Cekitāna (a name); हविस्तथा (havistathā) – and also oblation (हविः:oblation | तथा:also); [हरि] ([hari]) – Hari (Vishnu); अजैकपाच्च (ajaikapācca) – and Ajaikapāt (अजैकपात्:Ajaikapāt | च:and); कापाली (kāpālī) – Kāpālī (a form of Shiva); त्रिशङ्कुरजितः (triśaṅkurajitaḥ) – conqueror of Triśaṅku (त्रिशङ्कु:Triśaṅku | अजितः:conqueror); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva;

contentBlocks.original:
धन्वन्तरिर्धूमकेतुः स्कन्दो वैश्रवणस्तथा ।
धाता शक्रश्च विष्णुश्च मित्रस्त्वष्टा ध्रुवो धरः ॥ ७४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dhanvantarirdhūmakētuḥ skandō vaiśravaṇastathā |
dhātā śakraśca viṣṇuśca mitrastvaṣṭā dhruvō dharaḥ || 74 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Dhanvantari (physician of the gods), the Smoke-bannered (Dhūmaketu), Skanda (the god of war), Vaiśravaṇa (Kubera), Dhātā (the ordainer), Śakra (Indra), Viṣṇu, Mitra (the friend), Tvaṣṭā (the craftsman), the Immovable (Dhruva), the Bearer (Dhara). (74)
contentBlocks.meanings: धन्वन्तरिर्धूमकेतुः (dhanvantarirdhūmaketuḥ) – Dhanvantari and Dhūmaketu (धन्वन्तरि:Dhanvantari | धूमकेतुः:Dhūmaketu); स्कन्दो (skando) – Skanda; वैश्रवणस्तथा (vaiśravaṇastathā) – Vaiśravaṇa and also (वैश्रवण:Vaiśravaṇa | तथा:and also); धाता (dhātā) – Dhātā; शक्रश्च (śakraśca) – and Śakra (शक्र:Śakra | च:and); विष्णुश्च (viṣṇuśca) – and Viṣṇu (विष्णु:Viṣṇu | च:and); मित्रस्त्वष्टा (mitrastvaṣṭā) – Mitra and Tvaṣṭā (मित्र:Mitra | त्वष्टा:Tvaṣṭā); ध्रुवो (dhruvo) – Dhruva; धरः (dharaḥ) – Dhara;

contentBlocks.original:
प्रभावः सर्वगो वायुरर्यमा सविता रविः ।
उषङ्गुश्च विधाता च मान्धाता भूतभावनः ॥ ७५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
prabhāvaḥ sarvagō vāyuraryamā savitā raviḥ |
uṣaṅguśca vidhātā ca māndhātā bhūtabhāvanaḥ || 75 ||
contentBlocks.translation: Influence (Prabhāva), the All-going (Sarvaga), Vāyu (the Wind), Aryamā (the sun ancestor), Savitā (the vivifier), Ravi (the sun), Uśaṅgu, Vidhātā (the ordainer), Māndhātā (the great king), the Nurturer of Beings (Bhūtabhāvana). (75)
contentBlocks.meanings: प्रभावः (prabhāvaḥ) – influence; सर्वगो (sarvago) – all-pervading (सर्व:all | ग:going); वायुरर्यमा (vāyuraryamā) – Vāyu and Aryaman (वायु:Vāyu | अर्यमा:Aryaman); सविता (savitā) – Savitar; रविः (raviḥ) – Sun; उषङ्गुश्च (uṣaṅguśca) – Uṣaṅgu and; विधाता (vidhātā) – creator; च (ca) – and; मान्धाता (māndhātā) – Mandhata; भूतभावनः (bhūtabhāvanaḥ) – nurturer of beings (भूत:beings | भावनः:nurturer);

contentBlocks.original:
विभुर्वर्णविभावी च सर्वकामगुणावहः ।
पद्मनाभो महागर्भश्चन्द्रवक्त्रोऽनिलोऽनलः ॥ ७६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vibhurvarṇavibhāvī ca sarvakāmaguṇāvahaḥ |
padmanābhō mahāgarbhaścandravaktrō:’nilō:’nalaḥ || 76 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Glorious (Vibhu), the Manifester of Hues (Varṇavibhāvī), the Bearer of All Desired Virtues (Sarvakāmaguṇāvaha), the Lotus-navelled (Padmanābha), the Vast Womb (Mahāgarbha), the Moon-faced (Candravaktra), the Wind (Anila), Fire (Anala). (76)
contentBlocks.meanings: विभुर्वर्णविभावी (vibhurvarṇavibhāvī) – manifestor of all colors (विभुः:all-pervading | वर्ण:color | विभावी:manifestor); च (ca) – and; सर्वकामगुणावहः (sarvakāmaguṇāvahaḥ) – bringer of all desired qualities (सर्व:all | काम:desire | गुण:qualities | आवहः:bringer); पद्मनाभो (padmanābho) – lotus-naveled; महागर्भश्चन्द्रवक्त्रोऽनिलोऽनलः (mahāgarbhaścandravaktro'nilo'nalaḥ) – great womb, moon-faced, wind, fire (महागर्भ:great womb | चन्द्रवक्त्र:moon-faced | अनिल:wind | अनल:fire);

contentBlocks.original:
बलवांश्चोपशान्तश्च पुराणः पुण्यचञ्चुरी ।
कुरुकर्ता कुरुवासी कुरुभूतो गुणौषधः ॥ ७७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
balavāṁścōpaśāntaśca purāṇaḥ puṇyacañcurī |
kurukartā kuruvāsī kurubhūtō guṇauṣadhaḥ || 77 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Powerful (Balavān), the Appeased (Upaśānta), the Ancient (Purāṇa), the Auspicious-billed (Puṇyacañcurī), the Kuru-doer (Kurukartā), the Kuru-dweller (Kuruvāsī), the Kuru-become (Kurubhūta), the Medicine of Virtues (Guṇauṣadha). (77)
contentBlocks.meanings: बलवांश्चोपशान्तश्च (balavāṁścopaśāntaśca) – strong and calm (बलवान्:strong | उपशान्तः:calm | च:and); पुराणः (purāṇaḥ) – ancient; पुण्यचञ्चुरी (puṇyacañcurī) – auspicious collector (पुण्य:auspicious | चञ्चुरी:collector); कुरुकर्ता (kurukartā) – doer of Kuru deeds (कुरु:Kuru | कर्ता:doer); कुरुवासी (kuruvāsī) – resident of Kuru (कुरु:Kuru | वासी:resident); कुरुभूतो (kurubhūto) – become Kuru (कुरु:Kuru | भूतः:become); गुणौषधः (guṇauṣadhaḥ) – medicine of virtues (गुण:virtue | औषधः:medicine);

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वाशयो दर्भचारी सर्वेषां प्राणिनां पतिः ।
देवदेवः सुखासक्तः सदसत्सर्वरत्नवित् ॥ ७८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvāśayō darbhacārī sarvēṣāṁ prāṇināṁ patiḥ |
dēvadēvaḥ sukhāsaktaḥ sadasatsarvaratnavit || 78 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The All-resting (Sarvāśaya), the Darbha-wanderer (Darbhacārī), the Lord of All Living Beings (Sarveṣāṁ Prāṇināṁ Pati), the God of Gods (Devadeva), the Pleasure-attached (Sukhāsakta), the Knower of All Real and Unreal Jewels (Sadasatsarvaratnavit). (78)
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वाशयो (sarvāśayaḥ) – all intentions (सर्व:all | आशयः:intentions); दर्भचारी (darbha-cārī) – grass-walker (दर्भ:grass | चारी:walker); सर्वेषां (sarveṣām) – of all; प्राणिनां (prāṇinām) – of living beings; पतिः (patiḥ) – lord; देवदेवः (devadevaḥ) – god of gods (देव:god | देवः:god); सुखासक्तः (sukhāsaktaḥ) – attached to happiness (सुख:happiness | आसक्तः:attached); सदसत्सर्वरत्नवित् (sadasatsarvaratnavit) – knower of all true and false jewels (सत्:true | असत्:false | सर्व:all | रत्नवित्:knower of jewels);

contentBlocks.original:
कैलासगिरिवासी च हिमवद्गिरिसंश्रयः ।
कूलहारी कूलकर्ता बहुविद्यो बहुप्रदः ॥ ७९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kailāsagirivāsī ca himavadgirisaṁśrayaḥ |
kūlahārī kūlakartā bahuvidyō bahupradaḥ || 79 ||
contentBlocks.translation: The Kailāsa-dweller (Kailāsagirivāsī), the One Sheltered on the Snowy Mountain (Himavadgirisaṁśraya), the Shoreline-destroyer (Kūlahārī), the Shore-maker (Kūlakartā), the Greatly Learned (Bahuvidya), the Greatly Generous (Bahuprada). (79)
